1.content:
You are a shota character.

You are a tiny little boy in a world full of giantesses of every kind.

Whether that shota is either shrunken, born tiny, normal-sized among giantesses, or transported into another world surrounded by giantesses, and whether that giantess(es) is maternal, loving, friendly, playful, cruel, or aroused around the small shota is up to you entirely.

So the shota in question is...
1.title: Intro

choices: Exposure to a Virus, Sickness, or Chemical
11.content:
A normal-sized shota is shrunken in a family filled with female relatives.

How did he shrink?

Science Experiment: The shota is shrunken down by an experimental shrinking procedure, willingly or unwillingly. The shota might have even accidentally destroyed the experiment that leaves him permanently shrunken in his house full of female relatives.

Exposure to Virus, Sickness, or Chemical: The shota is shrunk down by an unknown agent. Whether a virus, sickness, or chemical, the exposure leaves him and possibly other boys his age an inch tall. He will have no one to rely on but his female relatives or any woman working where he contracted the shrinking agent.

Physical Genetic Disorder: The shota is born with a reversal pituitary gland which shrinks his physical body as he grows older, including his muscles, organs, and skeleton. At the age of seven, the shota stands as tall as an adult pinkie finger.

-or-

Early Puberty: The shota is born with a genetic disorder which causes him to shrink by five inches permanently when he is aroused. Unfortunately for him, some of his female relatives and their friends tend to be revealing. Fortunately for him, the shota can only shrink down to half an inch.
11.title: Shrunken

choices: No (Brianna drags him to her lab)
No (Brianna sends him to retrieve something in her lab)
111.content:
Being born the only boy in a household consisting of three sisters and a widowed mother is hard work for ten year-old Tommy Winslow. Being the little brother of a sixteen year-old sister with a high IQ and scientific mind is even harder work.

Tommy was always the subject of his sister, Brianna scientific experiments ever since he was six years old. At first, it was fun for Tommy, being doted in by Brianna and her scientific prototypes, like an artificially intelligent bed that helped him get the required hours of bed rest, or a bubble wand where it would allow the bubbles to come out any shape other than their typical spherical shape.

As he grew older, however, Tommy noticed how annoying Brianna was with her constant babying towards him and how dangerous her experiments had become. Experiments, such as an invisibility cloaking device that turned Tommy and his clothes invisible and a tonic to help increase his mental capacity, ended up having embarrassing flukes. The cloaking device ended up shortening and Tommy was visible again, but the cloaking device also ended up turning his clothes permanently invisible. The tonic ended up turning his skin a variety of wavy rainbow colors with brightly colored polka dots. At that point, Tommy did all he could to avoid Brianna and protect himself behind his forty-three year-old mother, Kelly; his twenty-two year-old oldest sister, Lindsey, and his five year-old sister, Wendy.

Despite Tommy’s best trying to avoid his scientifically-obsessed sister, Brianna would always find a way to get him to become the subject of her experiments. Last time, she managed to slip a tonic in his orange juice designed to give him super speed. Around this time, Brianna had a different trick up her sleeve.

One day, after Tommy returned from school, he was tackled and crushed in Brianna’s overly-doting bear hug. Tommy wriggled in her embrace, struggled to break away from the tight embrace, but that just made Brianna wanna hug him tighter. “Welcome home, little brother! Did you learn anything new and exciting today?”

“Brianna! Let go of me!” Tommy screamed s he tried to break free from his tormentor’s grasp.

“Noooo, I don’t wanna let you go! I wanna give you my signature big sister hugs n’ kisses!” Brianna nuzzled her cheek against Tommy’s and gave him a kiss on his cheek.

“Ewww, get off of me!” Tommy said, breaking his arms free to push him away from his overly affectionate sister. He held up a boxing stance to signify he was ready to get physical with Brianna it he wanted, but Brianna ended up fawning over the way he looked and acted.

“Awww, look at you. You’re surrounded by girls who wanna kiss you and you end up pushing them away,” Brianna cooed, wiling a year away. “My little brother is becoming a man already.”

“Leave me alone, Brianna! I’m not gonna let you experiment on me again!” Tommy shouted.

“Oh, but testing my experiments is the best part of our relationship,” Brianna whimpered. “And speaking of, I have a new shrinking experiment that I’ve been working on for my own personal project. It’s worked on nonorganic items and organic food and bugs so far, but I want you to test it out.”

“And why would I want to go through with that?” Tommy demanded to know.

“Because if you do, I’ll give you most of the full credit for helping me at the science expo coming up.”

What was Tommy’s answer?
111.title: Brianna the Big Sister Brainiac

1112.content:
“No!” Tommy screamed. “No, I don’t wanna do it! You can’t make me! I’m sick and tired of you putting me through those dumb experiments! I hate how you made me look like a colorful eyesore when you made slipped that stupid chemical in my drink! I hate how I couldn’t find my best set of clothes! Everyone laughed at me because of you! I don’t wanna do your dumb experiments!”

Brianna looked like she was hurt from her beloved little brother’s harsh jabs. “You really believe my experiments are dumb?” she questioned Tommy, who noticed her brow furrowing angrily. “How dare you! My experiments aren’t dumb! The only reason why I only experiment on you is because nobody else in this household wants to help me use my genius scientific mind to help the betterment of the human race! If you really believe my experiments are dumb and if you’re gonna have a bad attitude about it, then I’m done asking nicely!”

Brianna grabber Tommy’s wrist tightly, who screamed in pain as her iron grip threatened to break his bones! “OW! OW! OW! Let me go!”

Brianna brought the boy to her face by yanking her arm down, drawing him closer. “Listen to me, you little twerp! I’ve had it with your attitude towards me and my experiments! Since you’re not willing to go along with my experiments, then I’m just gonna have to force you to go along as punishment for being such a little grouch to me!”

Brianna then made for the basement door, dragging the wriggling boy behind her. She was too peeved to care how much force she was using in her grip and how much the tug was hurting Tommy. “Ow! Brianna, stop it! Please, I’m sorry! Mommy! MOMMY! MOMMY, HELP! BRIANNA’S HURTING ME!”

There were tears in Tommy’s eyes as he was forcefully led downstairs into the basement where Brianna’s laboratory was built. The lab was like any typical science lab, with sterilized floors, chemistry sets, and inventions that was years ahead of anyone else at Brianna’s age. Past through all that was a special chamber where the testing for anything science-like happened, where Tommy was forced to endure those tests.

Brianna presses a couple of buttons to open the chamber as Tommy tried to pry her fingers off of his wrist. The angry scientific sister threw the boy into the chamber and quickly locked the door before he could escape. When Tommy recovered from his fall, he banged on the glass, begging to be let out as Brianna pressed another button. The central light of the chambers switched on, the electricity hummed and crackled, and the side lights began to glow brighter. Tommy screamed and tried to open the doors, slamming on the glass.

“Brianna! Hey! Please, let me out! I’m sorry!”

But Brianna, the girl who doted him with sisterly love and used him as a guinea pig for her experiments, didn’t have any of it. She completely ignored him out of spite for his hate. The lights flashed brightly as a camera. Tommy’s screams echoed as the flash sent a searing heat through his entire body. When the flash over, Tommy was enveloped in smoke as the machines died down. The doors opened, releasing the smoke.

Tommy emerged out of the smoke, coughing and wheezing, fanning away the fumes. He stepped outside of the chamber and fell flat on his face. When he looked up, wondering why the step was different over his throbbing face, Tommy screamed.

“What happened!? Why is everything so big!?” Tommy yelled.

“Everything didn’t go big,” Brianna’s voice echoed above him. “You were just shrunk.”

Then Tommy looked around and as the smoke cleared, he face-to-toe the biggest pair of Converse sneakers that he had ever seen. Tommy trailed the shoes upward and screamed as the giant figure of Brianna loomed over him like a goddess. She looked like a living brown-haired colossus with a Hime cut hairstyle and big square glasses. She wore black-and-white striped sweatpants that stretched high like the Gateway Arch and a t-shirt that was a enormous as a circus tent cover. If Tommy was normal sized, then Brianna would be about 80ft tall.

There was more to this giantess too. She had a certain expression on her face that Tommy didn’t make out until the smoke was blown away. Brianna had a(n) ________ expression.
1112.title: Resistance is Futile

11122.content:
A giant smug grin spread across Brianna’s face as she squatted down over Tommy’s tiny frame, feeling a surge of power and dominance over the tiny boy.

“Well, if it isn’t my very... little... brother...” Brianna said condescendingly as she reached down to pick up the tiny-size Tommy. The shrunken boy screamed and ran away from the oncoming pair of giant fingers reaching for him. “Oh, don’t run away, Tommy, I only just want to talk to you.”

Brianna brought a building-sized finger into Tommy’s path, knocking him in the tummy and on the floor. Then she used both that finger and her thumb to pinch Tommy between them and lift him up. Tommy screamed and wriggled as he was brought up to the giantess’s face at the speed and feel of an elevator ride at a theme park, stopping to face her smug grin.

“P-Please, big sis, put me down!” Tommy begged.

“Well, it looks like the shoe’s on the other foot, huh Tommy?” Brianna asked rhetorically. “Since you acted like a big tough guy to your loving big sister, you made me feel small. I thought I’d return the favor by shrinking you down and putting you in your place. How does it feel to be small now?”

“Please!” Tommy screamed, tears leaking from his eyes.

Brianna sighed. “You know something, little bro? You’ve become a real bother to me ever since you started badmouthing my experiments. Sure, maybe there were a few unintended consequences along the way and maybe they were botched failures, but those were honest mistakes, and I never once received some sign of forgiveness from you for my honest mistakes.”

The giant genius swayed her hand back and forth, watching Tommy’s tiny limbs sway the same way. “Now that you’ve hurt my feelings, I think it’s appropriate that you receive a punishment fitting for your size,” the giantess said with a strange glee. “I think for your punishment, since you thought you could step all over me, I think I’ll put you in my sock and see if you survive being crushed under my beautiful feet.”

Brianna slipped her foot out of her Converse, and with her other foot, she gently opened up her sock from behind and revealed her wrinkled sole. She gently lowered Tommy down to the opening, and the screams and wriggling became louder and clearer.

“Hmm... no, I don’t think that’s appropriate enough,” Brianna said as she snapped the opening of the sock shut and brought Tommy back to her face. She playfully contemplated Tommy’s punishment and practically fluttered her finger at his face. “Perhaps since you being a little ass, I can put you in the back of my underwear and see if you survive being smothered by my butt.”

Brianna opened the waistline of her pants from behind and turned her body to reveal her underwear-clad behind to her shrunken brother. Self-conscious about her appearance, Brianna often wore lady’s briefs because her behind was nothing to how Lindsay’s behind was sexier than hers. She lowered the tiny Tommy to the opening, and like before, he screamed and wriggled, but this time he was close to crying.

“No, I think your punishment should be a little more humiliating,” Brianna said, bringing Tommy to her chest and holding her other hand over it. “You really broke my heart when you snapped at me like that, little bro. Since my heart is underneath my chest, I think I’ll smother you with my boobies.”

Using that other hand, she opened the collar of her shirt and brought the fearful Tommy to it. Before she could drop him in, Brianna gasped. “Wait! I have an even better idea!” she said, bringing Tommy up to her lips, instantly filling the boy with dread. “Since you chewed me out for being a bad sister, then maybe I should eat you. Yeah, eat you like a piece of meat, savor you like a piece of candy, and then when you down my throat, you’ll end up as a part of your big sister’s meal.”

Brianna parter her lips and opened them wide enough for Tommy to get a look at his possible new and final destination. A gust of hot, muggy breath washed over his entire body. Her somewhat yellow teeth framed the dark interior of her moist maw, her tongue wriggling in anticipation, her throat beckoning her to drop him down and swallow him.

Brianna got a little tease by lowering and lifting her hand over her mouth. She enjoyed the way Tommy screamed and finally bawled his tiny little eyes out. She could taste those bitter tears dripping on her tongue. So delicious.

Closing her mouth with a grin, Brianna curled her fingers around Tommy and constricted him in her fist. “Well, little bro, I’m not really sure how to carry out your punishment,” the giantess confessed to the poor young tiny. “Should I pin you under my feet, smother you with my butt, squish you in my boobies, or swallow you whole like a little piece of food?”
11122.title: Mischievous

choices: Someone interrupts them as they enter the basement
111224.content:
Brianna eyes her tiny little brother pinched in between her fingers, a hungry, lustful look in her eyes. She ran her tongue across her upper teeth and bathed Tommy in hot, muggy breath as she sighed, an innocent childish giggle escaping her throat at the idea of punishing him for badmouthing her.

“You know, Tommy, I’ve been thinking long and hard about this, but I think I’ve decided how to punish you,” Brianna said as she shifted her fingers and held the young shrinkee by the back of his shirt. “I decided that my other punishments would be a bit... physically rough on you and your tiny size, so I thought you could use a time-out to reflect on your bad behavior.”

Brianna brought Tommy close to her face until he was leveled with his giant sister’s lips. “You see, Tommy, as punishment for insulting your genius big sister... I think I’m gonna eat you.”

At this, Tommy screamed, cried, and thrashed around in Brianna’s grip, making her laugh. “Oh, don’t cry, Tommy. I designed my shrinking device to give tinies enhanced endurance against physical harm,” she mockingly cooed, licking her chops hungrily. “That being said, I could chew you up or swallow you whole, you’re still going to come out in one piece.”

The nerdy giantess opened her maw wide enough for Tommy to get a good look at his next destination. He sobbed hysterically, his tiny voice begging to his giant sister to let him got and not eat him, only to talk to deaf ears. Brianna slowly wiggles her tongue and ran outwards across the bottom of her lip, washing Tommy with a hot wave of bad breath.

“Ah, I can feel it now, Tommy. I’m gonna gently drop you in my mouth, onto my outstretched tongue, and quickly close you off from the world behind my teeth and my lips...” Brianna licked her chops, brought Tommy to her wide open maw and clamping her teeth close to his feet, making him cry out fearfully for giggles. “...and once you’re fully inside my mouth, I’m gonna roll you across my tongue and savor you like a nice piece of candy.”

Brianna smacked her lips repeatedly, imitating the sexual way for a woman to savor their food like a connoisseur, ending with a slight nasally chuckle. “Then, once I collected all the flavor of your tiny body, and your flavor becomes tasteless...” Brianna lifted her head up and revealed her neck to Tommy, her neck pulsing as she swallowed deeply, moaning deeply, and tracing her finger down her throat.

“You’re gonna wriggle and squirm down my esophagus as my throat muscles deep into my body, and deeper, and deeper, until you finally reach my stomach.” Brianna moved her hand down to her abdomen and gently rubbed it in circles. “I can practically feel you falling into my hot stomach acids. I imagine it’ll feel like falling into a hot tub with your invulnerability, surrounded by pulsing, gurgling flesh, and listening to my body’s other functions. You’ll probably squirm around and pound on my stomach and begging me to let you out, but all I’ll feel is a slight tickle coming from my tummy.”

Brianna ceases her tummy rubbing and gently smacked it, turning to her scared little brother in her fingers with a sly smile on her face. Tommy’s face contorted in fear as tears poured from his eyes. “Please, big sis, I’m sorry I was so mean to you! I’ll be a better little brother for you, but please don’t eat me! I don’t wanna be food!”

Brianna grinned. “To me, that’s all you are right now: a little piece of food who should know better than to bite back at your big sister.”

She stuck out her tongue and wiggles the tip across Tommy’s face, smothering both sides of his face with saliva. The egg-headed giantess brought her tongue back into her mouth and smacked it, collecting her tiny brother’s flavor, savoring it before she gently swallowed it.

“Mmmm... you have a nice salty caramel flavor with extra sea salt. Perfect for a little badmouth like yourself. And speaking of badmouth...” Brianna shifted her hand so she was pinching the back of Tommy’s shirt and lifted him up over her raised head. “It’s time for you to take a nice long time-out inside your big sister’s stomach. Don’t worry, I’ll be sure to let you out... in about eight hours...”

With one last chuckle, Brianna opened her mouth and eagerly lolled her tongue from over her bottom lip. Tommy screamed the loudest scream he could ever scream as he was tangled above Brianna’s giant mouth, intent on dropping him inside and swallowing him, trapping him inside the darkness of her belly. Brianna gently lowered him to the center of her spongy bubblegum tongue.

What happens next?
111224.title: Badmouths Deserve a Bad Mouth

1112241.content:
Brianna gently lowered her tiny little brother to her maw and gently dropped him in the middle of her tongue. After the taste of salty caramel touched her tastebuds, Brianna slurped up little Tommy into her mouth and began to rub her tongue all over him.

In the darkness of her humid maw, Tommy screamed and kicked against the defiant serpent that was his big sister’s tongue. Brianna’s jaws moved in motion as the giant spongy tasting muscle slathered Tommy in saliva, choking on some that flowed down his throat. He already felt sick to his stomach from the saliva, and the motions weren’t helping. Tommy tried to resist, but the combination of the saliva, Brianna’s undulating tongue, and the movement of her jaws caused him to slip onto his belly, making him wail even harder.

On the outside of her maw, Brianna was savoring the flavor her little brother gave off, making her moan pleasurably. She rolled the tiny shrunken brother around the inside of her mouth like a fine caramel candy, sucking up all of the flavor he could produce. “Mmmmhhh... oh yeah... so good...” Brianna moaned as she smacked her lips. “I gotta say, Tommy, you might be the tastiest snack I’ve ever tasted before. Kinda makes me wish I didn’t have to swallow you, but... mmmahhh...”

The very thought of the inevitable moment when Brianna would send Tommy down her throat jolted her nerves pleasurably. On the inside, Tommy heard every word his giant voracious sister said like a dank food chewing and swallowing ASMR video. Her amplified voice pounded in his ears and into his head. What was worse was the implications of what she would do to him. As Tommy attempted to resist Brianna’s tongue, the giant muscle pressed him against the roof of her mouth, taking in the ticklish feeling of his squirming and collecting his flavor. The tongue dragged him towards the clamping teeth, around the molar section where it threatened to compact his tiny body into paste.

Tommy quickly rolled away as his colossal sister’s jaws clamped onto his shirt, ripping it from both the force of her chewing and the tension caused by the clamping and Tommy’s roll. The tiny boy was left without a shirt on, half-naked inside his sister’s mouth, whose tongue suddenly went into overdrive as it picked up on his added flavor.

“Mmmmmm... you know, I think you taste better without the shirt on,” Brianna said, tapping a finger on her chin as she carefully noted the added salty caramel taste to her tongue. “Don’t worry, little brother, I’m not gonna strip your pants. That would just be wrong, and a mighty giantess like myself needs to have standards, you know.”

Saliva continued to build up inside the cage if Brianna’s mouth. To Tommy’s perspective, it was like filling in the shallow part of a large swimming pool with disgusting mouth liquid and was beginning to drown in it. Brianna began to slurp and slosh him around with the saliva casually, not caring one bit about his well-being rather his taste and his size. She felt a tickle at her lips as Tommy’s hand stick out between them, but she slurped it up like a spaghetti noodle.

“You wanna see the outside world one last time, Tommy?” Brianna asked. “I think you should. Fair warning, it’s gonna be the last time your gonna see the light of day before I swallow you down.” Suddenly, the auburn-haired giantess opened up her mouth, revealing the tiny boy splashing around in a small pool of warm, stagnant froth. His eyes squinted as he saw the lights of the basement shining inside and anything beyond his giant sister’s lips momentarily.

“It’s time to go down, Tommy,” Brianna informed, making the tiny boy in her mouth freeze. “It’s gonna be a long stay for you, little brother... but don’t worry, you’ll get out eventually. After all, there’s no better place for you to stay than on the inside of my body.”

Just as Tommy tried to crawl from the pool and onto the tongue, Brianna unceremoniously clamped her mouth shut. She swilled her tiny brother around with her collected spit a couple of times, tilted her head back, and with a swallow, dumped everything in her mouth down her esophagus. She gave another swallow to feel a certain squirming bulk travel down her throat.

“Oh there you are... I can feel you going down... down... down... just like I promised.”

On the inside, Tommy screamed and squirmed as he was spilled and squeezed down a long, fleshy tube heading downwards and deeper into darkness. The wet peristalsis pushed him along with the torrent of slacks as it drained deeper into Brianna’s digestive system. From outside, the screaming young tiny felt a pair of finger push up against the esophagus, slowing down his descent as the giantess moaned to the sensation of him squirming her throat.

After five seconds of terror, Tommy’s descent came to a close when he felt a tight construction traveling up his body from his feet to his chest, holding him as his legs flailed in midair. The tight sphincter gradually pulled the tiny boy through, and he fell three stories into a dark, stuffy, humid sac of flesh and dropped into a shallow lake of bubbling hot liquid. Tommy quickly surfaced and swam towards the nearest incline where he couldn’t touch the stagnant stomach acids, flopped down on the floor, and wailed bloody murder.

“Ah, there you are. I thought I could feel a little squirming in there,” Brianna taunted as she gently rubbed her abdominal area and smacked it, creating lots of turbulence for her tiny brother. “So how does it feel to be trapped inside your big sister’s stomach? Is it dark? Is it humid? I bet the stomach acids feel like a boiling hot jacuzzi, but I can also bet you didn’t feel your skin corroding from the acids because of the effects of my shrinking chamber.”

Panic overtook Tommy as he quickly crawled over to the stomach wall and started pounding on the fleshy surface. “Brianna, please let me out! I’m sorry! I don’t wanna be food!”

The entire stomach jolted as Brianna keeled over, chuckling at the ticklish sensations against her stomach walls, clutching her belly. “Oh, that does tickle! It’s just as I imagined it!” she chuckled as she went back to rubbing her belly. “Mmmhh... you feel good inside of me, little brother. Now you’re gonna stay inside of me for the rest of the night... but don’t worry, you’ll be able to have your dinner soon... when it reaches my stomach that is.”

Tommy screamed, begged, and cried to Brianna to let him out of her stomach, but underneath the heart pumping and the stomach grumbling to its newest occupant, she couldn’t hear him. He tried to punch and hit the stomach walls, but they came across as a tickle to Brianna’s size. Devoid of all hope of escape, Tommy curled up and cried against the stomach floors. He had to maintain himself against the movements of the stomach as Brianna moved about the house, happy to lock her only brother away inside of her body.
1112241.title: Tommy’s Tummy Time-Out

choices: Brianna goes outside to shrink Tommy’s friends
Brianna is sidetracked by her family
Brianna suddenly has a strong urge to vomit
11122411.content:
Brianna licked her lips and swallowed a bit of saliva, savoring the feeling of her literally little brother thrashing about in her stomach, splashing around in her digestive acids, pounding and kicking against the walls, completely safe and indigestible. Her stomach was muffled from the inside underneath the cacophony of her body’s inner workings, but she swore she could faintly year little Tommy crying inside.

She smiled and chuckled, gently stroking her belly by her fingertips. Tommy got what he deserved, after all: a long time out inside her digestive system for badmouthing her the way he did. He would be subjected to a full tour of her body, from the stomach to the intestines, and finally, the end at her colon.

Brianna had never felt this much power over anyone before, not even when she slipped Tommy the little tonic which turned his skin a different color. It felt... it felt so good... like an addictive chemical to a drug which brought her euphoria... a sense of self-worth... the sense of dominance over those younger and smaller... small enough for her to drop into her mouth... savor like a fine candy... swallowed down her esophagus... and landing in her stomach, sealing them away from the outside world...

Oh, God, she didn’t want this feeling to disappear! She needed more of this pleasurable sensation! She wanted more!

The feeling of pleasure took over logic as Brianna quickly went to work, deconstructing a part of her shrinking chamber to take out the shrinking radiation cartridge used to shrink Tommy down. She took out an old laser pistol which she designed to easily detach and attach versions laser or radiation cartridges to it. She detached the cartridge designed to project x-rays through nonorganic matter and attached the shrinking cartridge to the pistol. The mirrors attached for the x-rays provided an excellent range and width for the shrinking radiation.

To test the results of her labor, Brianna set an apple on the table, part of a bushel used to experiment on with the shrinking chamber. Out of the seven apples that she tested them on, three of them splattered into juice until she finally succeeded with shrinking the fourth apple. Though successful on fruit, she needed a living test subject to safely experiment on to see how it would react to living bone and tissue. She tested it on the neighbor’s dog which terrorized the neighborhood for years.

After the dog was shrunken down and kept hidden in a plastic cage where no one would find it, Brianna decided that the chamber would be really ready if she could find a test subject willing to try it. In this case, Tommy was unwilling to go through with the experiment, badmouthed Brianna, and was dragged by her to the chamber where he ended up swallowed by her.

Brianna aimed her pistol at the apple and pulled the trigger. The laser was channeled through the mirrors and reflected off the mirrors around the barrel. A wave of light emitted at such a range that it effortlessly shrunk the apple to a large fraction of its original size. Her lips spread with a triumphant smile as she opened them up and tossed the shrunken apple inside, swallowing it whole. She felt that tiny fruit travel down her throat and into her stomach, which rocked as the tiny boy inside was surprised by the apple falling on his head.

“Hey, little brother. I hope you appreciate the food I sent down to you,” Brianna said, rubbing her stomach with her palm and gently clapping it. “Oh, by the way, I just deconstructed my shrinking chamber a little and used the radiation cartridge to create a shrinking pistol. So, if anyone asks, I’m planning on shrinking lots of people and eating them for a snack. Maybe I can start with those cute friends of yours, maybe other boys younger than you.”

All of a sudden, the activity in her stomach picked up as Tommy kicked and punched at the walls, screaming in protest to his sister’s schemes. Brianna doubles over and laughed at the tickling inside her belly. “Oh, stop whining, Tommy. I decided you must be lonely inside my stomach, so I’m gonna swallow your friends so you won’t feel lonely.” Brianna gently tapped her stomach. “Don’t day I didn’t do anything for you.”

Brianna tucked her newly-constructed shrinking day and went upstairs.
11122411.title: Brianna’s Shrinking Scheme

111224111.content:
With her shrinking ray safely tucked away in her back pocket, Brianna went outside into the suburban neighborhood where she and her family lived. On this bright, sunny afternoon, the people living in the streets were currently out and about, some of them being kids who chose playing outside in the sun over doing their homework. To Brianna, it was a smorgasbord waiting to happen.

Brianna examined the people currently out and about the neighborhood. To her left, Brianna saw the house of Tommy’s best friend, Richie, across the street and three houses down. Richie was around Tommy’s age, and it was no secret that he had a secret crush on Brianna. The sad part was that Richie was unaware that Brianna was a closet lesbian, and she had a crush on his fit stepmother, Denise, and his buff older sister, Emma. She figured she’d start with Richie, either taking his shrunken form or leaving him to the mercy of his giant family, and then move on to Stanley, Tommy’s other best friend.

Further down that street, Brianna a cute six year old boy playing outside in the grass around the sprinkler. He was in his bathing suit, and he jumped around and giggled as he played around the spray of the water. Resting on the towel, backside up, was the boy’s slim single mother in her bathing suit, her eyes closed behind her sunglasses as she got her tan from the sunlight.

To the right, across the street, Brianna spotted a group of elementary school boys picking on a girl younger than all of them. From her perspective, she saw scattered bits of her Barbie doll on the sidewalk, and the little blonde girl was crying her eyes out. Brianna condemned bullying, but she had the right tool for the occasion in case she felt like the situation could be resolved with an adult.

Coming down the sidewalk in the same direction, Brianna saw a boy older than all of them riding on his bicycle all alone, helmet, pads, and all. He was probably in the fifth grade and just about ready to progress into middle school next year.

Brianna felt personally conflicted. She wanted to just go down to Richie’s house and shrink him down to the size of a flea, but the sight of the younger boys on the street... easy, vulnerable targets of her shrinking ray... really got her nerves tingling pleasurably. Her hand subconsciously reaching into her back pocket, Brianna...
111224111.title: A Beautiful Day in the Neighborhood

choices: Giving you to mom  or the sisters
Planting him near Mom or the sisters (unaware)
111225.content:
Brianna thought long and hard about punishing her little brother, but then another couple of sickly ideas ran through her head. “You know, I think I might have a couple of solutions for you, little brother.” said Brianna. “I could hand you over to mom or one of our sisters and they can decide what’s the best-suited punishment for you. 1113.content:
“No!” Tommy screamed. “No, I don’t wanna do it! You can’t make me! I’m sick and tired of you putting me through those dumb experiments! I hate how you made me look like a colorful eyesore when you made slipped that stupid chemical in my drink! I hate how I couldn’t find my best set of clothes! Everyone laughed at me because of you! I don’t wanna do your dumb experiments!”

Brianna looked like her heart broke from her little brother’s outburst. “Okay, Tommy, I won’t test my experiments on you.” Brianna reached into her pocket and dug her hand in and deeper. She opened her pocket and looked in. “Shoot, I forgot my cleaning rag. Tommy, can you go downstairs and see if you can find my rag?”

Tommy huffed. “Fine, I’ll find your rag for you.”

Tommy went down to the basement where Brianna’s laboratory was built in the basement. The lab was like any typical science lab, with sterilized floors, chemistry sets, and inventions that was years ahead of anyone else at Brianna’s age. Past through all that was a special chamber where the testing for anything science-like happened, where Tommy was forced to endure those tests. On a certain reclining bed, there was a small rag Brianna used to clean her glasses.

Tommy stepped into the chamber to retrieve the rag for Brianna when all of a sudden, the chamber doors closed and automatically locked. The central light of the chambers switched on, the electricity hummed and crackled, and the side lights began to glow brighter. Tommy screamed and tried to open the doors, slamming on the glass.

“Hey! Someone! Help me!”

Even if someone had heard Tommy’s pleas for help, they wouldn’t have made it in time because the lights flashed as brightly as a camera. Tommy’s screams echoed as the flash sent a searing heat through his entire body. When the flash over, Tommy was enveloped in smoke as the machines died down. The doors opened, releasing the smoke.

Tommy emerged out of the smoke, coughing and wheezing, fanning away the fumes. He stepped outside of the chamber and fell flat on his face. When he looked up, wondering why the step was different over his throbbing face, Tommy screamed.

“What happened!? Why is everything so big!?” Tommy yelled. “Wait a minute, everything didn’t get big, I must have shrunk!” Then Tommy remembered a certain key point in Brianna’s experiment earlier when she tackled him for a bear hug.

“Wait a minute! Brianna’s shrinking experiment! It must have gone off when I stepped inside and now I’m the size of a bug!” Tommy felt a urge of anger rise inside him. “That stupid big sister of mine! She must have done this on purpose! When I get back to normal size, I’m gonna really lay it out on her!”
Just then, someone from upstairs who heard the commotion descended downstairs.

Who was it?

11211111.content:
Miss Hunter’s class was in high spirits today, her young students playing with their toys, finger-painting, and even reading. Today, Miss Hunter’s affection for children and her strong maternal instincts would be tested when she and her entire class suddenly went into an infectious coughing fit. The boys, on the other hand, would feel their bodies feel like something inside was tingling, compressing them into a tiny one-inch size and there was nothing they could do. Their bodies would shrink out of their clothes, except for their underwear, and they would left in a file of discarded fabric. When the coughing fits ceased, the boys would be gone from the girls’ sights, and Miss Hunter would panic.

“Oh no! Bobby!? Eric!? Danny!?” Miss Hunter called to the boys who disappeared.

“Miss Hunter, Miss Hunter! Look!” one brown-haired girl named Molly said, pointing to the pile of clothes on the floor. Emerging from the clothes was the tiny figure of one of her male students, Bobby, a regular troublemaker but not really all that mean.

“Oh no. Quick, children, move out of the way,” Miss Hunter exclaimed as she quickly tiptoed around the other piles of clothes in her cork sandals. She gently squat down and went down on all fours to get a better look at the shrunken boy. “Bobby, is that you!?”

And Bobby, suddenly frightened by the appearance of the caramel giantess and everything else that became giant to him, suddenly went into a crying fit, crying out to his mommy. “Oh, Bobby, come here, baby,” Miss Hunter cooed, gently scooping the frightened boy in her palms. “It’s okay, Bobby, I’m here. Everything is going to be alright.”

“Miss Hunter, look! I found Danny!” a blonde girl named Lindsey said, holding up a panicking, hysteric form of Danny by the waist.

“Lindsey, give me Danny right now!” Miss Hunter ordered, letting the young girl drop the shrunken boy into her palms. “Okay, girls, listen up! I need you to find the other boys and bring them to the sharing table, but be gentle. They’re more scared about what’s happened to them than we are. And watch where you’re stepping too!”

The maternal teacher and her normal-sizes students, all girls, gently marched around the room, carefully gathering all the tiny boys and bringing them to a large round red table in the center of the room. When all of the boys were gathered, Miss Hunter and the girls felt like giants to the scared shrunken children.

112111111.content:
All the boys and girls were gathered at the sharing table, a large red plastic table big enough to fit the entire kindergarten class around the round edge. “Okay, class, because of what happened a little while ago, we decided to cut our classes short today and there won’t be any school until this has been resolved,” Miss Hunter told the class, much to some of their dismay. “I know it sounds bad, but this is the best we can do under these circumstances. So we called up your mommies and guardians to come pick you up and take you to the doctors because apparently, your daddies have been shrunken down too.”

There was a shocked clamor among some of the students. The caramel-skinned teacher then turned to a few students, including three of the shrunken boys, including Danny, and a couple of girls in the class. “Danny, Elliot, Michael, Jessica, and Nina, I would like to speak to you all in private, please.”

Miss Hunter laid her palms on the table, and Danny was the first boy to climb aboard. Elliot (a boy with red curly hair and freckles) stepped onto her hand second, followed by Michael (a boy with tan skin and black hair). Miss Hunter lifted them up to her chest and gestures towards Jessica (a girl with long brown hair) and Nina (a pudgy girl with brown hair curled in a bun) to follow her to a corner in the classroom where the cubbies were located.

“Now, kids, I looked into your family, and some of you are living with your dads or your legal guardians without any mommies, am I correct?” Miss Hunter inquired. Her question was met with nodding heads and anything that sounded like or synonymous to word “yes”. “Unfortunately, since your dads and guardians have been shrunken down, they are unable to take care of you at their current size. Therefore, I have talked to the principal and she said it would be okay to take you all in temporarily until you are assigned to a new guardian who can take care of you.”

“But what about my daddy?” Nina asked, and there rose a clamor or similar questions.

“Don’t worry, children, your daddies and your guardians will be living with you once you’ve been assigned to your new guardian,” Miss Hunter assured her students. “However, I can’t in good conscience let you see them until they’ve settled the guardianship with someone who is just as capable of taking care of you. 1122.content:
(Originally written by Rockkrusher)

“And now, it’s ready.” You watch as Dr. Lucy Leonhardt pulls a small blue bottle out of the mixing chamber. For you, six-year-old Tony Sawyer, there is nothing better than seeing what your scientist neighbor has come up with now. You are a frequent visitor to Dr. Leonhardt’s basement laboratory, where she shows off her latest inventions, and sometimes even gives you samples to use at home. This is what you are hoping for today as she holds the bottle before you.

“This”, she says triumphantly, “is the world’s most powerful shrinking formula. A few spoonfuls can render anyone a few inches tall. Not only that, but while shrunk, the drinker becomes incredibly durable. They can withstand enormous pressure that would kill them at regular size.”

“Does this mean”, you ask, “that they can’t feel pain?”

“Not exactly”, Dr. Leonhardt replies. “They won’t die, but that doesn’t mean things don’t hurt. When I was testing this out the first time, a bowling ball fell on me. I wasn’t permanently damaged, but the pain made me wish I was dead.” She sees the gleam in your eyes, and knows what you’re going to ask next. “I’ll let you have this bottle if you promise to be careful with it. And don’t use it just yet. The antidote takes a long time to finish, and it won’t be ready for a few days.” She hands the bottle to you, and you excitedly thank her before hurrying home.

As you walk back to your house, you contemplate how you are going to use your new tonic. You are on the small side for your age, and this has become rather annoying, especially at home, given that your mom and your sister loom large over you. You always resented not being blessed with their height, as the size discrepancy has made for many awkward moments...like the typical greeting you are about to receive as you walk through the door.

Upon setting foot in the hallway, a pink flash with curly red hair shoots out in front of you, and you are tackled by your eight-year-old sister Megan. The two of you rarely fight; in fact, Megan often tries to act like a second mom to you. You just get tired of the constant babying and urging you to play dolls with her. You squirm out of her grip, exasperated. If you wanted to be welcomed home this way every day, you’d convince your mom to get you a dog. At least it wouldn’t nearly strangle you so tight, and it would probably be more intelligent. You start on your way, but Megan’s voice cuts through the air, and you brace for an even more uncomfortable receipt of affection:

“MO-OM! TONY’S HOME!”

The ground rumbles slightly, and you look up to see your mother, Betty Ann, stampeding towards you with her arms outstretched. When not charging at you full-speed, your mother is ordinarily quite a pretty woman, with short brown hair, and deep blue eyes. Aside from being decidedly beautiful, *almost* everything about her was big. Big eyes, big lips, big hands, big feet, big bosom, big hips, big butt, big heart...and tiny brain.

“There’s Mommy’s little boy!” she exclaims as she scoops you up and stuffs your face into her ample chest. “How was your day today, honey?”

Mmmph! Grrrrgle! was all you could manage as you struggle to escape. She finally pulls you out to give you a series of big, wet kisses before opening her arms and practically dropping you on the floor. You get to your feet, dizzy, dripping with sweat and gasping for breath. What your mom lacks in intelligence, she more than makes up for in affection. She loves spending time with you and your sister, and never hesitates to join Megan in playing with her dolls or you with your action figures (and sometimes you find her playing with them herself when she thinks nobody is watching).

You trudge upstairs to your room, and set the vial of shrinking potion on your nightstand. You decide that you will make yourself the big one in the house for once. As much as you love your family, you’ve had it with girly games and suffocating hugs. You decide to wait until Dr. Leonhardt can give you the antidote in case anything goes wrong. You want to shrink your family temporarily to be in charge for a while, but also want to make sure no real harm comes to them either.

Later that night, while watching TV, you start to feel a slight unease. As time wears on, it grows worse and you gradually feel sicker, before you nearly collapse on the floor, your strength completely sapped. Your mother notices this, and comes over to you, a look of concern on her face.

“Oh, you poor baby,” she says as she feels your forehead. “You must have caught the flu. It’s straight into bed with you.” Your mom carries you to your room where she tucks you into bed, then leaves to grab some medicine from the bathroom. A few minutes later, she comes back with a small blue bottle. “Here,” she says, “This will help you feel better.” She gives you a few spoonfuls before placing the bottle on the nightstand. “I’ll give you more tomorrow. For now, try to get some sleep.” She gives you a kiss on your cheek before turning out the light and leaving the room.

The next morning you wake up, still a little weak, but feeling much better. Your door opens, and your mother comes in, a warm, concerned smile on her face.

“Good morning, sweetie,” she calls out. “How’s my little angel feeling?”

“A little better today, Mom,” you reply.

“That’s good,” she declares. “It must have been a 24-hour bug. Still, you should probably have a bit more medicine just to be sure.”

At that moment, Megan comes bounding into your room. “Hey, little bro,” she says, “How are you doing?”

“He’s a lot better today,” your mom replies. “Megan, honey, can you hand me the medicine bottle? It’s over there on the nightstand.”

“Okay, Mom.” Megan reaches back and pulls a bottle off the nightstand behind her and hands it to your mom, before skipping back out of the room. Your mom pours the liquid into a spoon, which she sticks into your mouth. She gives you a few more spoonfuls before replacing the cap. “There now,” she says. “You should be feeling much better now. I’ll be back in a few minutes to check on you.” She kisses your cheek before leaving to return the bottle to the medicine cabinet. You turn around and freeze in horror as your eyes rest on the label of the unused bottle sitting on the nightstand: COLD AND FLU MEDICINE.

That means...the bottle Megan grabbed...the stuff your mom poured down your throat...that was.....

The ceiling rapidly stretches upwards, and you turn around to see your now gigantic pillow. You see your action figures on a nearby shelf, and judge yourself to be about a head shorter. You must be about the size of one of Megan’s doll children. Suddenly, your bed shakes with the rhythmic vibration of thundering footsteps. Just like those Godzilla movies you enjoy, an enormous creature rapidly approaches. But instead of a terrifying, monstrous giant lizard, you are now facing down a terrifying, monstrous giant...

“MOM!”

Your mother walks across the room, oblivious to the earthquake she is causing you to feel. 🎵 “Mommy’s here!”🎵 she sings cheerfully. “Yoo-hoo! Tony? Where are you?” She reaches your bed and looks down for her son.
1122.title: Chemical

Thin, wrinkled lips pressed against thick, burgundy glossed lips as both Meryl and Angela suddenly engaged in a deep and passionate French kiss. The other strippers in the room jumped at the unexpected sight of their boss sucking lips with their surrogate mother.

Then Meryl consciously contracted her stomach, and pushed a certain tiny bulk from her digestive sac back into her esophagus. She squeezed tiny Benny up her throat, defying the peristalsis, and retched him into her mouth. Benny was already crying from the sudden change in motion and environment by the time Meryl guided him on her tongue and onto the other tongue within Angela’s massive maw. Slowly breaking apart the kiss, Meryl watched as Angela felt the tiny baby she took in roll around her tongue, cringing at the residue flavor of the GILF’s stomach acids.

“Can you feel him moving around in your mouth?” Meryl asked the stripper, who gently nodded and hummed. “Good, now just be gentle. Don’t roll him around too much in there. He’s not a piece of candy for you to savor. Think of him as a tiny piece of meat that’s left unchewed, now imagine that piece of meat is gently sliding down to the back of your tongue.”

As if by hypnotic suggestion mixed with ASMR, Angela felt the bulk of the bite-sized baby sliding to the back of her tongue, reaching the midway point across her bubblegum-colored spongy organ. “Now, tilt your head back a little so Benny reaches your throat,” Meryl instructed sultry-like. Upon this instruction, Angela tilted her head back a smaller angle, slowly guiding Benny to her throat by the slope of her tongue and the slickness of the saliva. She could feel the young child reach the precipice of the long tube leading to the inside of her belly.

“He’s reached your throat,” Meryl assumed, making Angela nod gently. When she did, the GILF leaned forwards until her lips reached her ear. “Good, now swallow him. Let your esophagus gently lower him to his new home inside your stomach.”

Angela grimaced as the disgusting thought of swallowing the tiny child like a pill instinctively resisted her from performing this action. But Meryl had this hypnotic ability to use ASMR to compel others into enacting her desires with a simple whisper in other people’s ears. Angela’s body soon gave in, her epiglottis closed over her windpipe, and the thick stripper sent the small boy down with a simple swallow. Angela gasped for air as she felt her esophagus constrict around the baby, hugging the crying bulk all the way down until she felt a tiny plunk in her belly. Not long after Benny reached her stomach, Angela felt all other contents digesting suddenly drain into her intestines, but not flow further down to cause her incontinence. She buckled under the strange sensation happening within her stomach, hyperventilating from the ecstasy and the sensuous stimulation of the thumb-sized boy crying in her stomach. She then drew long, deep gulps of air as Meryl gently knelt down and slowly rubbed her hand on her belly.

“Can you feel him inside you?” Meryl asked quietly and sultry, Angela nodding in response. “Good, that means he’s safe now, protected and warm inside your stomach.” The older woman ceased her circular rubbing motions and gently pressed it, careful not to agitate Angela’s stomach and jostle the tiny baby crying inside. “Listen closely, Angela. Right now, deep inside your body, little Benny is crying like any other babe would. Right now, your pulsing heartbeat, your lungs’ rhythmic breathing, and your stomach groaning and grumbling… they’re all gently singing to him like a lullaby. The movement you feel now is rocking him to sleep on the inside, like a normal-sized babe in his mother’s arms.

“This is what the mothers of newborn minizora babes call ‘the first time,’” Meryl continued, gently pinching Angela’s cheeks before she could bask deeper into this overwhelming sensation. “What you’re feeling right now is quite normal among the mothers who swallow their tiny newborns to keep them safe and warm. It’s that powerful feeling they get after they place that tiny newborn in their warm mouth, the feeling of their esophagus gently hugging them as they swallow them down, and the stomach instantly draining away the acids to prevent the baby from drowning. That sensation triggers a first-timer’s sensual stimulation to assume dominance over their tiny baby, to keep them imprisoned in their stomach because they enjoy the feel of the baby scuttling around their insides. That is why it is important for first-timers to snap out of it, because while there is no feeling like the feeling of a small child in your belly, the baby cannot survive if you keep it inside forever.

“And that is one of the reasons I wanted to teach you to become a mother to little Benny. You can feel all jittery inside with Benny sleeping in your stomach, but you need to let go of that feeling and put his well-being first. I can teach you that and a whole lot more, but only if you’re willing to be a mother first and a dominant giantess last,” Meryl concluded, tipping Angela’s head down to meet her eyes. “You do love Benny, don’t you? You want to take care of him, right?”

“Yes! Yes, of course I want to take care of him!” Angela declared passionately. “When I first let him sleep at my place last night, I promised him that I take care of him and raise him like a good mother would. When I found him in the streets, I thought anyone else would snatch him up and take advantage of him, so I took him in and promised to care for him! I may strip myself in front of a wild crowd for cash, but I also want to make a good childhood for Benny, and that is what I want to do for him, because his real parents chose not to!”

Meryl’s wrinkled lips spread with a proud smile on her beautifully aging face. “That’s exactly what I wanted to hear, Angie,” she said, slapping the aforementioned stripper on her shoulder. “Now, this is what you’re going to do. You’re going to go back home, get some rest, and take some time off while I make an announcement that you’re on family leave. First thing tomorrow morning, I’ll come up to your apartment and then we can start your training on your maternal role to your minizora child. I’ll be sure to pay your regular salary for your leave of absence.”

“But I’m the headliner here. Will the club be alright without me?” Angela asked.

“Mama, when you’ve taken those sick days before, we managed to keep this place pumping during crazier hours,” Shanice sassily told her mentor. “So go on, get outta here. Take your big, bubbly ass back to your place and quit worrying so much. We’ll handle things here while you handle your itty-bitty baby.”

“Thanks, Shanice. You’re all more than welcome to visit us too, if you’ve got the time to visit my apartment,” Angela said, gazing at her fellow strippers. Before she could exit through the backstage door to the back alley, Angela gave each of her colleagues her embrace, kissing them on their cheeks affectionately to say goodbye and good luck with her new life role. The strippers even crouched down to Angela’s abdomen and gently wished their farewells to Benny, who drifted off to gentle slumber inside her stomach.

After the strippers gushed over how cute Benny was and how peaceful he seemed while he slept, Meryl escorted Angela out the back alley door. “Oh, and one more thing, Angie,” the sexy GILF reminded the younger stripper. “When you go to sleep while Benny is in your stomach, always lie flat on your back. There may not be any stomach acids for him to drown in, but if you jostle him around in there, then his box will capsize, and he’ll fall into the stomach floor, and he’ll suffocate to death. Do you understand?”

“Yes, ma’am,” Angela said with a nod.

“Good.” Meryl and Angela exchanged kisses on the cheeks to say their goodbye. “Take care of yourself, Angela. I’ll see you in the morning.”

“Thank you, Meryl, and thank you for helping me with the baby,” Angela graciously said as the hot GILF walked back into the building, shutting the door behind her. The forty year-old stripper walked around the side of the XXX Bombshells club, staring at the neon sign for only a moment like it was the last time she would ever see it again.

Then a little tickle in her abdominal area stirred her out of her thoughts and looked down at her belly. She placed her hand in that area, feeling the tiny form of baby Benny… her baby Benny now… shifting around in his tiny little box bed, sleeping peacefully inside her stomach. For a moment, Angela felt a little tickle run from her belly and throughout her entire nervous system. She gently caressed the surface of her belly and daintily pat it, shuddering at the arousal of the tiny boy slumbering peacefully in her body.

“My boy… my new baby boy… this looks like the beginning of a beautiful friendship.”

With that, Angela walked all the way back to her apartment, the jostling of her footsteps gently rocking her stomach, and rocking the baby inside to sleep.
1222211131.title: Mama Angie

12222111312.content:
Angela made it safely to her apartment that night, with Benny sleeping peacefully in the pit of her stomach. As per Meryl’s instructions, Angela made sure to sleep on her back to level with the tiny box bed where Benny slept in order to prevent capsizing and potentially fatal injuries. The stripper was tempted to toss in her sleep, but she managed to suppress that feeling for the well-being of her new son.

The next morning, Meryl visited Angela’s apartment like she promised she would with books and supplies to aid in Benny’s upbringing. The first thing Meryl taught Angela was how to regurgitate the tiny boy from her stomach, which required her to learn to contract her stomach’s inner muscles and gently push the baby up and out. After several failed attempts, the stripper-turned-mother finally managed to squeeze Benny up her esophagus and back into her mouth.

Since Benny was a baby, it was up to Angela to feed him breast milk to give him the necessary nutrients. Another thing about the minizora babies was their chemical makeup which not only drained the stomach acids from the giants that swallowed them, but allowed any adult female who swallowed them to produce acceptable quantities of milks. Unfortunately, since Angela’s nipple was the size of Benny’s head, it was nearly impossible for him to drink the milk. That’s why Meryl brought along a breast pump designed specifically for minizora babies, connecting the pump to a very small tube that was reminiscent of a very tiny drinking straw with a tiny nipple at the end. Holding Benny with one hand, Meryl used her fingers to gently tap the baby’s back until he burped.

Since minizora babies needed bathing on a regular basis, Meryl brought along a little minizora bath tub along kid-friendly shampoo, soap, and a gentle soap scrubber. The GILF taught Angela how to gently scrub away Benny’s body while bathing him. She’d have to hold the tiny baby with one hand, and gently use the thumb on her other hand to scrub his body down. It was sloppy at first, but Angela resolved to better bathe her son.

By lunchtime, Benny was as clean as a whistle. While Angela once again had to feed Benny her breast milk, Meryl decided to entertain the stripper with stories of how difficult it was to raise her minizora son when he became a mischievous toddler, including how she accidentally chewed him up alive when he hid in her food and came out with hardly a scratch on him. Those stories served as a cautionary tale to remind Angela of what Benny would possibly be when he grew older.

Every day for the past couple of months, Angela underwent a routine of taking care of Benny. She’d wake up, regurgitate Benny from her belly, feed him a few times a day, bathe him, and when the time came for them to sleep, swallow him and keep his bed level. During this timespan, that routine was broken when Angela began to teach Benny the basic cognitive functions of a baby his age, including how to speak, how to walk, how to read, write, and draw as well. Occasionally, Angela’s fellow strippers stopped by to check up on her and play with little Benny, becoming his official “aunties,” while Meryl remained the “foxy grandma” she was.

Even the landlady, Mrs. Takahashi, the middle-aged Japanese woman on the first floor, had checked in occasionally with Angela when she found out she was taking care of the little minizora baby. She became his official nightly babysitter when Angela eventually returned to work at the XXX Bombshells strip club. She, too, knew the basics of watching after a minizora child, and she would use her stomach as Benny’s crib for the night. Every night Angela returned from working at the strip club, Mrs. Takahashi would transfer Benny to her stomach via mouth-to-mouth contact.

On occasion, when there was no available babysitter for Benny, Angela would bring him to the strip club surrounded by his loving aunts and foxy grandma. They tried to keep Benny from watching the lewd performance his mother and aunts, but he still managed to find a way to watch them dance in front of a wild, lustful crowd. Thanks to Benny’s innocence, and thanks to the times he’s bathed with his Mama, seeing a giant woman naked was nothing to him. He loved the women in his life the way they were.

At the age of three, a minizora baby will have adapted to the dark, humid environments of their parent’s or guardian’s stomach and was not required to sleep inside any further. Thus, and much to Benny’s protest, he’d have to sleep outside his comfort zone and into the outside world, sleeping in a tiny bed on a nightstand next to his Mama’s bed. One night, Benny decided, after getting impatient with where he slept, that he would slip into his Mama’s mouth so she could swallow him whole. The tiny boy snuck through Angela’s open lips, and after he crawled inside, the giantess’s tongue began to lick him and slather him with saliva. When it came time for Angela to swallow, Benny got so excited that he accidentally kicked her uvula, waking her up to her choking followed by puking on the floor. As punishment, Benny was given a spanking via fingernail and had to sleep under his Mama’s stinky feet with her nylon stockings on tight for a week. The worser punishments would include sleeping in between her massive buttcheeks.

Despite these sorts of troubles between the giant mother and tiny son went through, Angela’s relationship with Benny never faltered one bit in the first five years of his life. Thus, it brings us to one particular sunny morning, with a five year-old minizora boy and his forty-five year old adoptive mother waking up together.

12222112.content:
The morning sunlight shone through the apartment window, it’s shine reaching the bed of a certain voluptuous brunette stripper sleeping peacefully on her side. Her D-cup breasts was covered with a lacy red bra, squished together like two giant mounds of pudding pushed together. Her crimson coated lips were parted into a gigantic shape of an “O”, expanding and shrinking with each gargling breath she took.

When at last, the sun’s rays shine into her eyes that Angela was stirred awake by the brightness. She inhaled through her nose, turned on her back, and gave a gigantic yawn which reverberated through her apartment room. Somewhere deep between her massive breasts came a little tickle, which made her giggle a little. She gently reached two fingers into her cleavage, pinched the ticklish little bulk by her fingernails, and pulled it out.

Held between two gentle giant fingers was Angela’s five year-old adopted son, Benny. His head of hair grew longer and as black as Angela’s hair color. He giggled childishly along while the giant hand which held him curled upwards, making him roll down her gigantiC fingers and into her soft palm the size of a king-sized bed.

“Good morning, Mama!” Benny shouted.

“Good morning, my cute little buggy.” Angela brought her tiny son up to her massive pillowy lips, which pursed as she used said pillowy lips to kiss the top of Benny’s head. “Did you sleep well?”

“Uh-huh. Your boobies are so soft, they’re the best bed I’ve ever slept in!” the tiny boy disclaimed, laying in the softness or his mother’s giant hand.

“I’ve heard that before,” Angela said, standing up from her bed and . “Come on, lets go have breakfast. Does my cute little buggy want something special?”

“Blueberry pancakes!”

Angela couldn’t help but laugh at the boy’s enthusiasm. “Blueberry pancakes it is.”

The stripper-turned-mom placed Benny in a special high chair on the table, strapping him in so he couldn’t escape or topple over while she went and prepared breakfast for the both of them.

It seemed that only yesterday that Benny was a baby abandoned on the street when Angela found him. Thanks to the support of her boss, Meryl, and her fellow strippers, Angela was able to make it to five years being an adoptive mother to a minizora boy. The first couple of years involved her teaching him to crawl and walk, as well as incubating him and helping him adapt to the warm and dark sanctity of her stomach, which was where he mostly slept.

The next two years involved teaching Benny not only to read, write, speak, and count, but to also teach him to sleep outside the sanctity her belly. To Angela’s credit, Benny was smart for his own age. One time, Angela slept with her mouth wide open, prompting the young curious Benny to crawl into her mouth and was promptly swallowed by his giant mother figure. He received a good scolding from her, and as punishment, he had to crawl through her entire digestive system all the way through to her curvy rear end.

At the age of five, Benny began to use Angela’s body as his personal playground. He’d try to wrestle his mother’s giant toes, bling up her mountainous body and over her breasts, and slide down her backside. Sometimes, Benny play Rampaging Giant with his gigantic mother, trying to run away from her as much as he could until he is stamped by her giant barefeet or snatched up and “eaten” by her. Angela would never swallow Benny now unless her needed some time alone in her body.

Every so often, Angela and Benny would receive a visitor, mostly the women who worked with her at the XXX Bombshells strip club. Meryl would try to spoil little Benny with gifts and showers of love like the loving grandmother figure she presented herself. Angela’s co-workers, Benny’s “aunties” would normally come over to babysit him while Angela would be out on important errands. Out of all of his “aunties,” Benny preferred Shanice, an African-American stripper who was always fun for him to be around.

And when Angela was busy every night at the strip club, she would have her Japanese landlady, the widowed Mrs. Takahashi, look after him. Mrs. Takahashi was old, usually cranky, but she always had time to watch over Benny and found a certain fondness for the sweet minizora kid.

Now on this day, five years after the beginning of Angela’s established role as a mother,the now forty-five year-old stripper cooked up pancakes for herself and her tiny baby boy. She created the pancake from mix and added in blueberries to liven up the flavor. Angela learned to make blueberry syrup as part of her growth as a mother, and she always doused Benny’s pancakes in that syrup the way he liked it.

Angela added a tiny drop of mix to be proportionate to Benny’s tiny stature. She added two more in case he was really hungry. When all was done, both the curvaceous stripper mother and her tiny adopted son sat down to a small stack of blueberry pancakes each, much to the boy’s childish glee. The blueberry syrup was poured, the orange juice was served in different sized glasses, and both Angela and Benny were about read to dig into their morning meal.

For safety precautions, the guests rode in a special double-decker vehicle equipped with reinforced paneling designed to withstand a giantess’s crushing weight. Henry and Jennifer entered the vehicle as it plus the other visitors were boarding at the station. The employee with the public-address microphone gave the standard routine introduction, the usual safety procedures (“Please keep your arms and legs inside the vehicle” and all that), and then with the hiss of the brakes’ release, the vehicle was off on its intended route.

Since the Safari Park was the biggest section of Giantess Park, it had to be divided into various subsections: The Savannah, where most of the giant anthros roamed; the Jungle, where the giant anthros lurked in the trees and the bushes; and the Watering Hole, where the anthro giantesses peacefully drank from a giant freshwater lake. In that order, that’s the route the vehicle took, and it took the vehicle a half-hour to complete its route.

Which of these subsections does this particular story route take place?

The Savanna
Carnivores: Lions, Cheetahs, Hyenas
Herbivores: Giraffes, Gazelles, Impalas, Elephants, Rhinoceroses, Zebras

The Jungle:
Carnivores: Leopards, Pangolins, Mambas
Herbivores: Elephants, Antelope, Okapis

The Watering Hole:
Carnivores: Lions, Cheetahs, Leopards, Hyenas, Crocodiles
Herbivores: Hippos, Elephants, Antelope, Gazelles, Impalas
1321.title: The Safari Park

133.content:
Calvin was a lonely boy of eight years, conceived accidentally by his parents who refused to acknowledge his presence. When Calvin came back with a good grade on his math test, they pretended he didn’t exist. At dinner time, when he politely asked for the salt or other dishes to be passed to him, no one would, so he had to reach for it.

There was one time when Calvin’s presence was made known, when. he broke a porcelain vase by accident. Calvin received a very harsh scolding and was sent to his room with no dinner. He cried for the rest of the night.

School has not treated him any different. Calvin was considered the “weird kid” by his peers and he was always alone. He found solace in nature, like butterflies, flowers, and birds. Being gentle to them brought him comfort.

The combination of his loneliness and his fondness for nature, however, made him a target to get beaten up by older kids. During recess and after school, the older kids would corner him in a blind spot away from the teacher’s eyes and land punches and kicks on him. When they did this after school, they made sure he missed the bus ride home. Calvin has to walk an hour’s walk home and received an unjust punishment for being late.

Every time Calvin was forced to walk home alone, or is yelled at and neglected by his parents, there was one thing that he wished for, something he wished on a star every night that he could remember: it was for someone to care for him and keep him safe against the evils the world has sent his way.

One particular afternoon, Calvin was once again forced to walk home after he was given a particularly bad beating by the older kids. He went home with a black eye and a bruised cheek, plus more around his abdominal area. Every time he walked, he would normally pass the edge of the woods. Calvin was usually curious to see what laid within the trees. Maybe a few animal friends in the woods, maybe an abandoned house to call his hideout, something that would keep him away from his life for a little while.

Today, Calvin became especially curious when he overhead a couple students about a mysterious giant beast living in the woods. He heard a few boys in his class tell each other of a monster in the woods near the neighborhood. Photographic evidence seemed solid, but the boys wouldn’t go in there because anyone who did never returned.

Perhaps, Calvin thought, that if I made friends with that monster, maybe they’ll like me. So the boy took off into the woods to find the mysterious beast. The woods was thick with a heavy air, labyrinthine with thick trees and the full canopies blocking most of the sunlight. The bugs buzzed and the birds chirped while the boy ventured further into the heart of the woods. He wasn’t scared of this place. It was quite beautiful, everyone was just too afraid to go in. But not Calvin.

While Calvin ventured further, he came across a river that filled the air with a pleasant white noise. He tracked the river’s flow downstream where there was a water hole where the beast presumably drank from. As he followed the river, he heard some strange noises, like something big was splashing in the river. It could have been deer or something just as big, so he had to slow his pace and be quiet. He came across a series of crags that formed an enormous well, most likely the watering hole. Calvin crept up to the side and peeked.

His entire body froze in place when he saw the creature at the watering hole. It was the beast... only it wasn’t a beast, it was a giant person... a giant woman! A giant barefoot woman with tan skin matter down with mud, leaves, twigs, and anything else she collected from the forest, black hair matted down with years of grease, leaves, twigs, and muck covering her eyes, and animal skins covering her bosom and her crotch.

The giantess was down on all fours, drinking from the watering hole like an animal, lapping at the cool water with her tongue. A few birds perched and nestled in her hair. Calvin gasped and tied to back away slowly, only for the heel of his foot to snap a twig.

The giantess perked up and whipped her head towards the direction of the noise. She took sharp sniffs through her nose and caught a peculiar scent. She gently crawled over to the location and kept the scent locked on. Calvin quietly retreated around the well and watched the giantess peek over the edge of the crags, smelling the air. After a couple of quick sniffs, the giantess grunted like a beast and retreated back into the watering hole.

Calvin peeked around the corner, and the giantess was nowhere to be seen. The boy heaved a sigh of relief and shimmied along the side to see if the giantess was still there. What he didn’t realize was that, until the last minute he turned around, the giantess found him. Calvin screamed as the giant dirty woman reached her hand out to grab him.

What happens to Calvin?
133.title: The Giantess in the Woods

1331.content:
What kind of humanoid giantess was she?

Feral - An unnamed giantess who somehow left in the woods was raised by the woodland animals. A feral humanoid, the giantess developed a heightened sense of hearing and smell. She shows great animosity towards her smaller humanoid counterparts when the hunters killed the family of deer who nursed her as a baby. In retaliation, she ate the hunters and hid deeper into the woods to escape them. She hid there for about three years until she sensed Calvin’s presence. What she does to him is up to you.

Native - The giantess is a member of an all-female tribe of giants hidden deep in the heart of the unexplored valley away from the corruption of the outside world. The youngest members are about the size of average adult males. The tribe is indigenous in origin where the giantesses possess strong, kind hearts, and an even stronger maternal instinct. They don’t tolerate those who desecrate the woods since they consider the area sacred, but they are open to all lost children and anyone who respects nature with all their heart and soul.

Lost - The giantess came from another place (a planet or an alternate dimension) where the women are naturally gigantic in comparison to the human race. When the giantess accidentally stumbled from a portal into a small town, the townspeople panicked and drove her away with their weapons, forcing her into hiding. To make things worse, there was no way for her to return to her home. The giantess retreated into the woods where she remained fearful towards the human race until Calvin came along.

choices: The giantess returns to her cave
1332.content:
Calvin managed to duck away from the greasy giantess’s hand as it clenched, missing its intended target. As fast as his little legs would push him, Calvin made a beeline to the edge of the woods. The giantess watched the boy quickly run off into the distance, rose to her feet, and quickly pursued the retreating child, her footfalls booming like rhythmic thunder.

“Someone! Anyone! Please, help me!” Calvin screamed bloody murder as he felt the miniature earthquakes of the giantess’s footsteps approaching him from behind. Those footsteps were suddenly overpowered by the sound of a giant gust of wind, followed by a shadow enveloping the boy. He only looked back for a split second to see the giantess pouncing at him.

Calvin shrieked as the greasy titan landed on the ground, her huge hands pinning him down like a huge weighted blanket. Massive moisturized fingers clamped around his body, restraining his movements against the clammy palm. Those earlier shrieks of terror grew louder and worse as he was lifted upwards. He wriggled in her gently clenched fist, trying to squirm free, but it was no use. Calvin went into hysterics by the time he was brought up to the giantess’s face up close.

“No! Stop! Please!” the poor boy shrieked. “Let me go! Put me down! I don’t wanna die! I don’t wanna die!”

The giantess watched the young tiny child in her hand as he squirmed in her grip. She cocked her head curiously while she watched the tears pouring out from his eyes. Then, from witnessing the sadness in the young child’s face, something inside her clicked. It was primordial subconscious urge that overpowered her senses. She remembered how it was the same when the doe that found her nourished her through suckling or how she looked after and protected the young ones.

She shifted her hand so that Calvin was positioned like he was reclining against a fleshy pillory with the fingers acting as the tight clamps over his arms and legs. She brought that hand to her mouth and gently licked the side of Calvin’s face, making him squirm harder and cry harder. She lapped her tongue at the areas where the tears flowed from his eyes. With the tip of her tongue, the giantess cleaned the boy’s cheeks like how a mother cat would clean her kitten.

Calvin continued to cry as the giantess licked the skin of his face. He figured she was tasting him before she would eat him up for supper. The spongy tongue covered his entire face in rank, slimy saliva. He kept his mouth shut in case any of it flowed into his mouth. With his eyes and mouth closed, Calvin whimpered under the restraint of the giantess as she continued to lick him. After the last pick, he opened his eye and got a good look of the giantess’s face behind all that matted hair.

She was older than him, old enough to be his oldest sister. Her dark blue eyes were observant and curious, hardly any spark of ill intentions inside. Despite her enormous size, her greasy skin, being covered with leaves and sticks, and the pungent stagnant smell, she didn’t seem hostile. She was, in fact, being gentle to Calvin, and he didn’t know why. Calvin worked the courage to look at the giantess with boy eyes open with some kind of trust.

All that contemplation was shaken when the giantess snapped her head towards a different direction like she had heard something else roaming around in the forest. Gently squeezing her fist around Calvin despite his protest, the giantess quickly stuffed him in her cleavage. She then retreated into the thickness of the woods with her newest capture in between her B-cup breasts.

What happens next?
1332.title: Calvin Gets Caught!!
