1535531.content:
Timmy was only a boy of ten years when he and his brother Brian witnessed one of the greatest fights between heroes vs. villains inside the Overwatch Museum. Overwatch vs. Talon. Winston and Tracer vs. Widowmaker and Reaper over Doomfist’s powerful gauntlet.

He remembered his Brian ordered his brother to stay hidden while went out and helped the two famous Overwatch agents beat the Talon agents by using their own arm-shaped payload against them. When Widowmaker and Reaper retreated, Timmy remembered how Tracer told the two boys, “You know, the world could use more heroes.” That was the greatest day of the boys’ lives.

Not more than six months later passed by since then that the boys never stopped thinking about that day. Unfortunately, tragedy struck when Talon struck the shopping mall Timmy and his family went shopping at. Talon soldiers devastated the mall and everyone in it, except for a handful of survivors kidnapped to be used for Moira’s experiments, Timmy included. Timmy was the youngest victim taken by Talon, which intrigued Moira to the point where she focused most of her attention on experimenting on him.

One such experiment was forcing Timmy into a chamber where a radioactive veil swept over him, shrinking him to tiny size, the size of a thumb. Afterwards, they subjected him to many tests and discovered the chamber granted Timmy high physical durability and immunity to stomach acids. Upon this discovery, Timmy was often tested on by Moira, tortured by Widowmaker, and teased by Sombra for two straight months.

Then after the second month passed, salvation came for the traumatized shrunken boy when the female members of Overwatch took the Talon base by surprise, resulting in the rescue of three-quarters of the prisoners still alive. Tracer, who led the charge, found the tiny boy locked away in Moira’s office, huddled in his little energized cage. Tracer spent most of her time comforting the grieving boy in the aftermath.

Later, it was decided by Mercy and Tracer that the latter would adopt the tiny Timmy as her own little brother and be allowed to live with her and her lesbian partner, Emily. In addition, Timmy had to attend weekly psychiatric sessions with Mercy to help him with his psychological trauma from witnessing his family’s demise and being kept prisoner by Talon. Every day of the week, Timmy would be educated by the brilliant minds of Mei, D.Va, and Efi Oladele (with whom he falls in love with) to make up for the months of formal education lost in captivity.

Months after becoming a part of Tracer’s family and psychiatric sessions with Mercy, Timmy decided the only way for him to become brave was to train and become a member of Overwatch. Through training from various female members, and with the help of Hammond the mechanical genius hamster, Timmy is recruited into Overwatch as its youngest member to join. With the help of his new family, Timmy, the bite-sized boy is determined to avenge his old one.

What part of Timmy’s life are we focusing on?
1535531.title: Timmy

choices: Two Months Later, Overwatch Rescues Timmy
15355311.content:
It was supposed to be a good day for young Timmy and his family as they were all shopping at the shopping mall. There was him, his parents, and his older brother, Brian, who he admired for his heroics in the Overwatch Museum half a year back.

But things changed when the terrorist organization, Talon attacked.

Timmy remembered that moment when the Omnics, war machines hacked by Talon, caught their parents in the line of fire. They were among two of the two hundred expendable victims rained down by bullets from Talon’s men and machines. Timmy and Brian took cover in the shadows cast by the pillars, the benches, and the potted plants, helplessly watching as the civilians were mercilessly slaughtered by Talon, hearing their victims scream in terror and falling silently to the overwhelming gunfire.

Brian took a peek and spotted a phone on the other side of his hiding area. Knowing what had to be done, he firmly instructed Timmy to remain in his hiding area as he went for the phones. Stealthy as Brian was, when he tried contacting the police for help, his whispers attracted the attention of two Talon soldiers aiming their weapons at him. Timmy watched in horror as Brian, his older brother and hero, was shot and fell to the floor with a sickening thunk!, a puddle of blood pooling around him. Timmy gasped too loudly, and by the time he covered his mouth, the Talon soldiers moved in on him, their weapons raised at him.

Just before someone pulled the trigger, one of the Talon soldiers stopped the other from shooting the boy and received an order to take any survivor back to their base. The Talon soldier then grabbed Timmy by the arm and dragged the screaming, crying boy away from the scene of his family’s slaughter. He, among dozens of other crying survivors, were forced outside by gunpoint and taken to an aerial mobile carrier in the parking lot. Out of the victims who were taken, Timmy was the youngest.

The aerial carrier carried the kidnapped victims to Talon’s secret base somewhere in a snowy mountain range, where exactly, Timmy couldn’t tell. When the ship arrived at the base, the victims were forcefully disembarked and led into a dark corridor, thrown into energy cells designed to prevent them from escaping. The boy was surrounded by dark armored assailants with weapons and the dozens of people crying for the trauma of the wanton carnage, the deaths of their friends and families, or the fear for their lives. Timmy cried for all of the above.

Not long after they were locked, the doors opened, and through that door came three of the dangerous women in Talon: Moira, the Irish mad scientist; Sombra, the Spanish hacker and chameleon; and Widowmaker, the French femme fatale sniper. Timmy gasped and curled up in a ball, hoping that Widowmaker wouldn’t notice him because he was there when Brian slugged her with Doomfist’s gauntlet, the very weapon which she sought to ascertain and failed to do so.

“This is a lovely batch of test subjects our troops have collected,” Moira observed, admiring the variety of poor victims in her own sadistic glee. “Each of these subjects has the potential to become a part of something grand, something that will not only defeat Overwatch once and for all, but expand the science of borders to new horizons. For this, we need only choose one for our molecular compression veil. Now, who shall it be?”

As the three villainesses passed his cell, Timmy peeked from his curled position and caught a sneak peak. His scared eyes connected with Widomaker’s, and he quickly backed down. He shivered and internally prayed that the pale blue sniper did not recognize him, but the sound of high heels striding towards his cell confirmed his fear. “You zhere, boy!” Widowmaker called, banging on the cell’s energy field. “Yes, you, I seem to recall zhat face! Show eet to me now!”

With one giant bang against the field, Timmy jumped from his curling position. It took one look between the scared boy and the femme fatale for Widowmaker to suddenly get heated, unsheath her signature rifle, and aim her gun at the cowering boy. “I knew it! I know who you are, boy! You were zhere when your brother humiliated me in zhe museum!” Widowmaker screamed, making Timmy cower and cry. “Your brother ruined our operation to retrieve Doomfist’s gauntlet! Now you must pay!”

“Hold on, so that chico’s brother was the one who slugged you with Doomfist’s gauntlet?” Sombra asked, suddenly bursting out with laughter. “Oh, dama araña, that must have been embarrassing for you!”

“Mord ta langue, Sombra!” Widowmaker barked at the Spanish hacker. “His brother humiliated me, and he must pay for his brother’s crimes!”

Being someone with no remorse, Widowmaker had no qualms with killing kids, especially one who was involved with her failure for her mission to retrieve Doomfist’s gauntlet. Just as she was about to squeeze the trigger, a clawed hand belonging to the skinny redheaded belonging to Moira gently shoved the gun away. “As much as I enjoy a revenge killing from time to time, Widowmaker, I would advise restraining your impulses for the time being,” Moira said, approaching the boy’s cell. “Right now, I would personally like to inspect the boy.”

Moira nodded her head towards one of the Talon soldiers, and the soldier disabled the energy field. WIth a quick swipe, Moira tightly grabbed the boy’s wrist, the vice-like grip preventing him from fleeing and the vice grip feeling like it would crush his little bones. “Ow! Owww! Please, let me go! You’re hurting me!” Timmy begged, thrashing in her grip to break free.

“Quit struggling, boy. I am only going to inspect your vitals,” Moira said as she pulled up a holovid medical file on the boy.

Timmy sobbed and cried as Moira’s tight grip hurt his wrist. Moira carefully inspected the vitals with childlike curiosity. “Hmmm… oh… I see…” Moira swiped the holovid away and closely inspected the boy’s sobbing face, holding his cheeks with one hand underneath his chin. “Ahhh… yes, this is perfect. You are young, your body is constantly changing, and your vitality seems healthy enough for you to become my first test subject.”

Moira then proceeded down the corridor, dragging the boy with her.

“Ahhh! Where are you taking me!?” Timmy screamed.

“You are coming with me,” Moira answered. “You should be honored for being the first and youngest test subject for my latest experiment.”

“No! Let me go, I don’t wanna be your test subject!” Timmy screamed. “Someone, help me!”

Timmy’s pleas for aid echoed in deaf ears as he was led down the dark corridor and on the other side of a hexagonal door. Moira dragged the crying boy into her laboratory, an expansive white room with a desk and a computer, and a few ominous chambers with metal reclining hospital beds. The mad scientist left the soldiers to forcibly restrain the boy to one of the tables in the designated chamber as she typed in a few commands and prepared for its activation.

“Wait! What are you going to do me!?” Timmy demanded to know as he struggled against the restraints.

“You are going to be the first test subject of my matter reduction veil,” Moira informed the boy as she typed in the commands. “To put it lightly, this veil of radiation will reduce your size until you are 1/10 of your original size. Simply put, since you are 4 ft in height for your age, you will he reduced to 0.4 inches.”

“Y-You’re going to shrink me!?”

“Quite right. I look forward to the results of the experiment, and given your healthy vitality and growth, there is a 67.85% chance of success.” Moira reached to the controls, and gripped the lever. “Once this experiments succeeds, you will have the honor of becoming the breakthrough we needed to reduce the Earth’s overpopulation. Every shrunken human will struggle to survive in a world where the insects can crush them as the humans did their own species, Talon will stand high and mighty above those puny people, and no one, not even Overwatch can stop us.”

“Please, don’t! I’m begging you!” Timmy cried for his life, thrashing In his tight restraints.

“You don’t have any choice in this matter, young one.” Moira pulled down the lever, and the chamber whirred and hummed with life. “Now prepare yourself, boy, because your life will change in the biggest way possible!”

Timmy whimpered and screamed as he tried to escape the restraints, but he couldn’t even budge. As he vainly tried to set himself free, an overhead arch began to spin around the table where the boy was held. It spun faster and faster until it was a speeding blur. From the top of the arch, purple light sparked and crackled, forming a radioactive circle that slowly descended down the arch. Timmy’s struggles became more frantic as the radiation passed over him and through his body, subjecting him to shocking torture. His screams echoed in a bright flash of light.

When the radiation disappeared, the chamber’s humming faded away. The door was unlocked and automatically opened for Moira and her female companions to enter. As they did, they saw the metal bed was completely devoid of the young boy. Upon closer inspection, Moira gently scooped up something she spotted in the center of the bed and curled both hands around it. She turned to Widowmaker and Sombra with a triumphant smirk.

“Behold,” she said as she uncupped her hands, revealing the shrunken form of Timmy in her palm, clothes and all. He took one look at the giant faces of the villainesses and screamed, curling himself against the palm and hiding his face away from the giants’ gazes.

“With the matter reduction veil fully operational, now the real experiment can begin,” Moira said, an evil spark glistening in her eye.

Who do we follow next, and what will they do to Timmy?
15355311.title: The Tiny Prisoner of Talon

choices: “...we’re taking you to see (Mei/Hana/Efi) for your lessons.”
“...we’re gonna spend the day to ourselves.”
15355312.content:
The holovid hands of Big Ben struck six forty-five in early morning in Great Britain. The ring of the tower’s legendary bells echoed sweetly over London, waking up everyone who lived near the tower in the city. In one such apartment, a certain couple was stirred awake by the bells of Big Ben while the morning light cast its first glow.

One half of said couple was Lena Oxton, widely known as the time-slipping hero Tracer. Her sweet eyes fluttered and woke up to the most beautiful face on the planet in her eyes. A beautiful face decorated with freckles amid of a sea of orange-red hair. That face had a name, and it was Emily.

Emily inhaled deeply and let her eyes flutter open to the sight of the most adorable face on the planet. A face with the sweetest, childish eyes, a cute button nose, and brown spiky hair parted to the right side of her face. Her lips spread with a smile as she went in met her lips with Lena’s, giving each other a passionate good morning kiss.

“Good morning, beautiful,” Emily whispered in a slight Scottish brogue.

“Good morning, love,” Lena whispered back, wrapping her arms around Emily’s abdomen and pulling her closer, the redhead returning the courtesy and kissing her on the lips. “I had an awful dream last night. Overwatch finally defeated the Null Sector and Talon, and the world was entirely at peace again.”

“And what was so awful about that dream?” Emily asked.

“I didn’t have a sexy redhead beside me to celebrate our victory,” Lena answered with a playful pout.

“Awww, you poor baby. Here, let me make it up to you with some kisses.” Emily planted little butterfly kisses on Lena’s cheek and moved her lips towards the side of her neck. Lena giggled, protested, and writhed underneath the ticklish, yet stimulating sensation of her girlfriend hitting her ticklish spot. The mascot of Overwatch didn’t want this feeling to stop anytime soon, and to be frankly, neither did her lover.

The bells of Big Ben echoed outside their apartment walls. By the time the toll hit seven, both Lena and Emily finished their morning cuddling and kissing, basking in the afterglow of their love.

“It’s seven o’clock, love,” Lena informed her redhead lover, pecking her on the lips. “It’s about that time to wake up Timmy.”

“Aye, we can’t afford to have him sleeping in, what with the day that’s been planned and all,” Emily agreed.

“What say you put on the tea while I wake him up?” Lena offered.

“Fine, but only if you promise to make the eggs in the basket today,” Emily retorted.

“It’s a deal.” With one gentle kiss, Emily got up, put on her sweatpants, and walked over to the kitchen while Lena rolled over to the nightstand. On that nightstand was a doll-sized bed from Emily’s old dollhouse, and sleeping comfortably in that bed was the tiny ten year-old boy Lena and Emily adopted as their little brother.

Lena couldn’t help but gush over how adorable her tiny surrogate brother looked sleeping in the doll-sized bed. With two giant fingers, Lena gently wiggles them on Timmy’s sleeping form, trying to stir him awake. “Oy. Timmy, it’s time to wake up, little brother.”

Timmy whimpered in his sleep. “Just five more minutes,” he said, turning over to his side away from Lena’s face.

“Come on, Timmy, get up,” Lena whispered, but was only met with deaf ears. Then her lips spread with her signature sly smile. “Timmy, if you don’t get up, then I’m gonna give you little nibbles all over.”

She then lowered her lips and smacked them repeatedly across Timmy’s body, tickling him awake. He screamed and wriggled, laughing hysterically as the giantess tickled his tiny frame with tiny butterfly kisses which seemed like a full body tickle. The tiny ten year-old rolled on his bed, clutching his belly as Lena gave him one big kiss on his head.

“Ah, good, you’re finally awake!” Lena gently scooped the permanently shrunken boy up into her hands, gently clasped them into a gentle hold around him, and once again planted another kiss on his head, making him giggle. “Good morning, love! Did you have a nice little kip last night?”

“Mm-hmm,” Timmy mumbled, wiping away the crust from his eye.

“And did you have any dreams?”

“Mm-mmm.”

Lena felt a sense of relief from that. She and Emily had witnessed Timmy suffering from nightmares and panic attacks while he slept, a clear sign of post-traumatic stress in this young child.

“That’s good. A kip with no dreams is better than a kip with bad dreams, that’s what I figure,” Lena said, gently lowering her palm to Timmy’s tiny feet, offering him a lift.

Timmy took his giant surrogate sister up on her offer and stepped aboard. Everything lifted as Timmy was gently boosted up to the level of Lena’s pursed lips, planting a gentle full-body kiss on his side, making him giggle. “Come on, Emily is putting on the tea, and I’m putting on the eggs.”

“Yay! I love your eggs!” Timmy cheered.

“So does Emily. That’s why she wanted me to make them.” Lena gently deposited her little brother onto her shoulder and gave him time to hold on tight until she started walking out the bedroom. To Timmy, riding on Tracer’s or Emily’s shoulders was like riding a thrill ride at the fair, vertigo-so ducking heights included. He rode that ride all the way as Lena entered the kitchen where the two giant lesbians exchanged another good morning kiss and Emily gave Timmy one of her own.

Lena was glad that Emily accepted the tiny boy into their lives. Lena always told her red-haired lover about the boys who stepped in her fight against Widowmaker and Reaper and helped them win. When she told Emily about the tragedy Timmy endured, Emily was heartbroken since she wanted to meet the boy’s brother and thank him for aiding her. They along with their friends at Overwatch helped Timmy through his PTSD from witnessing his family’s slaughter and the torture at the hands, feet, and stomachs of Talon’s femme fatales.

Every week, Lena would take Timmy to see Dr. Angela Ziegler, the healing hero known as Mercy, for his therapeutic appointments. A few times on the weekdays, Lena would take him to see Mercy, Mei, Hana, or Efi Ofadele to be educated since he was too small to attend an educational institution. From first glance, Tracer could tell Timmy was in love with Efi because of the way he was shy around her. She often teased him about his crush, just like any sister would do their sibling.

That’s how it was for the past two months. Timmy was fortunate enough to be a survivor of one of Talon’s most deplorable attacks on humanity. He lost a family and came out scarred, but he found a new family in the women associated with Overwatch.

Lena banded Timmy over to Emily, who gently dropped him off on her shoulder while she went and prepared the eggs. Emily and Timmy watched the British morning news programs anchored by an Omnic and his female human co-anchor, the giantess sipping on her tea while the tiny boy slumped against her neck. Lena prepared two eggs in a basket, the traditional eggs cooked in the hole of the bread in a frying pan. She made sure to shrink the portions of bread, butter, and eggs to accommodate Timmy’s size.

When breakfast was made, the two women and their permanently shrunken brother ate their breakfast in peace. It was a morning of peace to start off the day right. When Lena finished off the last of her breakfast, she wiped away the crumbs from her hands and turned to Timmy, enthralled by the images on the TV.

“Oh, Timmy,” Lena called to Timmy, grabbing his attention as he had his egg halfway into his mouth. “After breakfast is done, we’d better get you dressed up and ready because today...”

15412.content:
Once upon a time, there was a ten year-old boy named Jack who lived in poverty with his mother. One day, Jack and his mother had very little money for food, so the mother said, “Jack, take Old Bessie to the market and sell her for profit.”

Jack took the family’s cow, Old Bessie to the marketplace when he happened to come upon a strange man who offered him magical beans in exchange for Old Bessie. So Jack traded the cow for the beans and merrily skipped home. When Jack told his mother and showed her the magical beans, the mother smacked the beans from his hand, struck him, and chastised him.

“You foolish boy! You stupid foolish boy! We would never fill our bellies on one bean, let alone three! You have been a shameful disgrace since you were growing in my belly! That is why your father left us in from financial ruin!”

Jack was so heartbroken that he had sequestered himself in his room for the rest of the day. During that night, the magical beans began to sprout and quickly grew into a giant beanstalk tall enough to stretch into the sky, into the heavens above.

The next morning, Jack and his mother were amazed by the sight of the giant beanstalk sprouting from their very own backyard. The beans alone were the size of a horse wagon. At the mother’s urge, she said to Jack, “Well? What are you waiting for, you fool!? Climb up to the top of the beanstalk and collect all the beans!”

Jack obeyed his mother and began to climb up the beanstalk, plucking every bean along the way and letting them fall to the ground. As he climbed higher, he climbed up into the clouds. Jack climbed higher and higher until he emerged from the surface of the clouds and was astounded to see a giant garden with vegetables the size of his house! Carrots, cabbages, radishes, cucumbers, tomatoes, and so much were laid out in a field bigger than his own village!

Beyond this garden was a castle as big as a small mountain. The doors alone were bigger than the church steeple. The curious Jack hiked through the garden and at the foot of the door, he pounded it hard with all his might. Not so long afterwards, the door opened and out stepped a giant woman the exact size of the steeple. She was a potbellied giantess who wore large rags similar to what his mother wore. Her dirtied feet were strapped in leather sandals, her toes wiggling in place. Her auburn hair was curled and tucked under a rag wrapped around her head.

“Hello?” the giantess called out to what she perceived as no one. “Who dares knock on my door and disappears while I prepare supper!?”

The chubby giantess hadn’t known that standing at her toes was an astounded little boy named Jack who was small enough to be eaten by her in one bite. The giantess then set her sights at the ground, and Jack’s blue eyes met her brown eyes. The giantess was...
15412.title: Jack and the Beanstalk

154121.content:
“By my word, can it be!?”

The thick-bellied giantess bent down and quickly scooped up the tiny boy in her palm just before he could get away. Jack was caught in the giantess’s pillowy palm and struggled to move as he was lifted up into the air and up to her face. He got a better look at the giantess’s round, freckled face, her giant brown eyes brightened up in wonder.

“Why, it is! A little boy stumbled upon my home!” the giantess said marvelously, holding Jack to close proximity to her mouth.

The size of the giantess’s mouth frightened poor little Jack. The maw was like a cave deep under the sea, dark and wet where hardly any light shone inside its deeper darkness. Her tongue was like a giant pink serpent waiting for its next victim to devour, and the incisor teeth were the size of an executioner’s axe. Worse was the abyssal throat which led down to the boiling cauldron of the giantess’s stomach where her food boiled and burned alive into nothingness in her digestive stew.

“Please don’t hurt me, miss giant!” Jack begged, cowering in the flesh of her palm.

The giantess let out a hearty chuckle. “Worry not, my tiny friend, for I do not desire the taste of human flesh, not even to children such as yourself! I am Helga Fostrajotunn, a kindly giant from a faraway land of giants of myth! Who are you and what brings such a young one to my home?”

“I am Jack, a poor and hungry boy from the land below the clouds,” Jack introduces himself. “I was given magical beans from a strange man for my family’s cow and for that, my mother punished me. The magic beans grew into the beanstalk that reaches here. My mother tasked me with climbing the stalk to pick the beans when I climbed through the clouds and beheld your garden and your castle.”

“Poor and hungry? You poor little one, you look like nothing but skin and bones!” Helga gasped. “Come inside. I will treat you to breakfast, but be warned, for my lover desires the taste of the flesh of tiny young ones like yourself.”

So Helga took Jack to her kitchen and treated him to a feast as she promised. A crumb of bread, a slice of cheese, a slice of meat, and a thimble full of milk. As Jack’s belly was filled from the feast, a brutish feminine voice rang out through the castle. “Wife! Where is my breakfast!?”

“Oh no! It is my wife, Marsha Laejotunn! She is a fierce giant warrior who devours anything she deems edible, including you!” Helga quickly scooped up the frightful Jack and scurried around the kitchen. “I must find a place for you to hide. No tiny person has ever returned from the inside of my wife’s belly! If you are eaten, you will never be seen again!”

“Wife! Answer me!” Marsha’s voice boomed. “Is my breakfast ready!?”

Through the doorway came a giantess, her body adorned with a build of muscles. Her long black hair hung from her head to her shoulders like a curtain of night. Her eyes were reddened from the excessive consumption of ale. She wore plated armor on her breasts and around her waist, Paul drone on her shoulders, heavy leather open-toes boots on her feet, and leather wristbands.

The sight of the other giantess entering the kitchen made Helga panic. In that panic, Helga hid the distressed tiny boy...

15412132.content:
“Forgive me, Jack, but I cannot risk my wife finding you,” Helga whispered as she opened her lips and consequently tossed him inside her great maw, moving him and pinning him under her giant tongue. The inside of her mouth smelled like rotting milk and stale saliva as Jack struggled against the giantess’s tongue and her bottom jaw.

“Wife! Where is my breakfast!?” the brutish giantess Marsha demanded.

“It is on the table, love, where it belongs!” Helga answered, keeping Jack hidden under her tongue while her jaw moved. “You have indulged in too much consumption of ale that it has clouded your vision of the food I have carefully prepared for you this morning! Oh, woe is me!”

Marsha couldn’t help but laugh. “Ha! Woe is you, indeed! My squadron has failed to access the world of the humans below for food and conquest and you suffer my drinking! I have yet to taste the sweet flavor of human flesh again, even the boy humans whose taste is fresher than the men!”

“Shame on you, my love! You would eat the children of the humans to satisfy your greedy, gluttonous belly, and satiate your own lust!” Helga scolded.

“Tell me not of my taste in human child, wife!” Marsha remarked. “You would coddle them as if a mother, but you only doom them to become fodder for me and my squadron!”

Marsha sat down at her table and began to gather a portion of each food onto her plate. She began to scarf down the breakfast, noisily chewing her food before she swallowed. Helga shuddered in fear for the poor young souls lost inside her wife’s belly. “It is the way of the giants to consume humans who are smaller than them, and it is only right for the giantess to swallow the human children as an act of mercy against being ravaged by the male giants!”

Helga was taken aback by this statement. “Marsha, my love, you wound me! The children of giants are no different from the children of humans! They are the future of their own kind, and to swallow the children means there is no future! My love, if only you had more of a taste for me as you do or the human children, then our love would be different!”

Helga turned her back to her brutish wife and began to cry from betrayal. Marsha, sending her wife’s hurt, approached her and gently held her close, Helga’s head reaching her chin. “Helga, my dear wife, please forgive my impertinence, but I dare not oppose to the nature of the giants I was brought up on. As much as I love the taste of tiny humans on my tongue, the taste your lips is the taste I desire above all else.”

So Marsha wipes away Helga’s tears and brought the flustered giantess’s lips to hers. The kiss started with the simple meeting of their lips, and then went deeper as Marsha’s tongue probed the inside of Helga’s mouth. Inside, poor little Jack, who had heard the entire conversation, was scooped up by another unforgiving tongue from underneath the one which pinned him down.

Marsha and Helga’s tongues wrestled each other, and in the deep feeling of their passion, they didn’t feel the tiny form of Jack on their tongues. While the giantesses’ tongues rolled around and probed deep inside Helga’s maw, Jack was rolled over, under, and around their tongues, scraped against Helga’s teeth, and slathered in stinky saliva. It was during this particularly deep kiss that...

15413.content:
In the original Gulliver’s Travels novel, Lemuel Gulliver washes up on the shores of Lilliput, a country inhabited by tiny people. He helps stop a war with the other country, Blefuscu in their disagreement over a marriage contract between both countries’ royal heirs.

In later chapters, Gulliver washes up on the shores of Brobdingnag, a country inhabited by giants where he is cared for by the young Brobdingnagian girl, Glumdalclitch. He is later brought before the Queen of Brobdingnag.

In our versions of this famous fantasy tale, where do we want to start?

Lilliput: A young Lilliputian boy discovers a giantess washes up on the shores of Lilliput. She is a descendant of Gulliver who wanted to prove the existence of Lilliput’ sting inhabitants and ends up meeting the tiny boy.

Brobdingnag: A young boy washes up on the shores of Brobdingnag where all the male giants are long gone, but they are inhabited by giant women. He is found by another Brobdingnagian girl named Glumdalclitch.

154211.content:
Peter Parker/Spider-Man - The shy and often picked-on school nerd who was raised by his Aunt May and Uncle Ben. During his school field trip to the science labs, Peter was bitten by a radioactive spider which endowed him with the abilities of a spider. After his Uncle Ben was killed by a burglar he let go, Peter Parker realized his responsibility as a hero.

Miles Morales/Spider-Man - The second person to take up the mantle of Spider-Man in the Ultimates universe after Peter Parker died in battle against the Green Goblin and his villainous army. Miles Morales was bitten by the same spider which gave Peter Parker his abilities, and installed a couple of features into his suit, including cloaking and electrical discharge.

Benjamin “Benjy” Parker - The biological son of Peter and Mary-Jane Parker and the baby brother of May Parker a.k.a. Spider-Girl. Born in an alternate universe where Peter Parker retired after his horrific battle with the Green Goblin, Benjy was born with some of his father’s abilities, which includes superhuman strength and shooting off webbing. Because of his familial ties with Spider-Man and Spider-Girl, Benjy is often the target of enemy attacks.

-or-

Franklin Richards - The biological son of Reed Richards/Mister Fantastic and Sue Storm/Invisible Woman, two central members of the Fantastic Four. Born mutated due to the astronomical radiation which gave Reed and Sue their powers, Franklin was gifted with psionic abilities and is one of the most powerful mutants in the world.

154222.content:
Choose these characters then...

Timmy Walker - An eight year-old boy who was on a flight with his family over the Bermuda Triangle when a strange lightning storm blew the engine. The strange electromagnetic pulses shrunk him right before the lightning struck the window and he was sucked out of his seat and into the sea before the plane landed in the sea. He washed up on the shores of Themyscira, home of the Amazons and Wonder Woman!

Aiden Jones - A boy who was born to two STAR Lab employees whose combined exposures to chemicals and strange radiation resulted in him being born tiny. 154222.title: Non-Canon

1542221.content:
Eight year-old Timmy Walker was on a flight from Florida to Italy when everything changed. After the airplane flew through the Bermuda Triangle, the plane was subjected to the intense electromagnetic storms where the compasses and the controls went haywire. As the helpless shrunken boy turned to his now-giant mother for help, great bolts of lightning struck the plane, one striking the engine and the other striking the window where Timmy sat. The engine exploded from the lightning strike and the destroyed window caused people to scream and feel the intense suction of the cabin pressure vacuumed out of the window. Timmy screamed and cried for his mommy as he was whisked away outside of the plane, falling to his watery grave while the rest of the people on the plane crash landed into the Atlantic too.

As the tiny boy crashed into the ocean, between his new tiny size and the ocean’s turbulence and pressure, Timmy struggled to swim up to the surface. Even with all of his swimming strengths, Timmy eventually succumbed to fatigue in his struggles and eventually lost consciousness. Before he blacked out, he swore he saw feminine shapes in the water swimming towards him.

When Timmy woke up, he suddenly found himself gagging all of the salt water out of his lungs. After hacking up the last of the salt water, Timmy looked around and saw he landed on a beach, now a hundred times bigger since his unprecedented shrinkage on the place. When he turned, he saw that he was...

154222121.title: Diana/Wonder Woman

choices: Diana takes him to her chambers
Diana takes him to her mother
1542221211.content:
Princess Diana of Themyscira was special, not because she was a god-gifted homunculus if clay with a soul or because she was the daughter of Queen Hippolyta, but because she was destined for more. On Paradise Island, there was hardly any corruption or war, but Diana felt there was something for her outside the forbidden mystic barriers surrounding the island with never ending storm clouds.

That feeling came to light when a giant metal bird crashed in the oceans far off the shores of Themyscira. It fell like any bird would fall when pierced with an arrow mid-air, except it stayed afloat in Poseidon’s wrathful waters. Her mother often told stories of flying metal birds like those when she was recruited as the Wonder Woman during World War II. She said it was to transport anyone inside its belly across the air and across the oceans. Diana felt herself saying a little prayer to the gods to deliver the poor souls on that bird whose lives would become food for the guarding megalodons.

As Diana witnessed the bird being slowly claimed by the sea, her peripheral vision caught something unusual crawling from the crashing waters on the shores. Using Artemis’s gift of the hunt, Diana squinted her eyes to get a better look.

Using her eyes, Diana saw a tiny figure... almost the shape of a person crawling. The person looked very small... perhaps it was a tiny child? From what she could see, the child was crying. Perhaps the small child was the only survivor of the metal bird’s demise, and traversed through Poseidon’s waters only to wash up on the shores of Themyscira.

“Great Hera,” Diana whispered as she quickly strode over time the tiny child.

As Timmy continued to cry over everything that happened to him and everything happening to him now, he heard the distinguishable sounds of footsteps on the beach. As a tiny child, Timmy could now feel those footsteps approaching his location. He turned to see in both awe and shock, the shape of a giant woman walking towards where he washed up to.

But this was no ordinary woman... the garb she wore was Greek in origin.

This was a beautiful fair-skinned giant with dark black hair hanging down her shoulders like a smooth curtain. She wore a leather breastplate and metal bracelets on her wrists going halfway up her forearms. Around her waist, she wore a belt with a scabbard sheathed with a sword, a white line skirt, and knee-high leather gladiator sandals on her immaculate feet.

The way she made a beeline towards the boy, and the way her eyes met his tiny frame, Timmy couldn’t help but panic. Timmy quickly scrambled to his feet and ran screaming while the giantess quickly and concernedly pursued him. “He’s afraid of me,” Diana thought to herself. “Little one, wait! Do not be afraid! I have not come to harm you!”

But the tiny panicking boy wouldn’t listen. Driven by his flight response, Timmy ran as fast as his tiny legs would let him. The booming vibrations of the giantess’s feet behind him began to grow bigger and more powerful as she quickly caught up with him. Then all of a sudden, a sandaled foot crashed at his heel, and young Timmy stumbles headfirst into the sand. Before he could recover, a couple of giant gentle ivory hands scooped the sand from beneath him and lifted him up into the sky.

The tiny boy whimpered and scrambled as the sand beneath him drained from the cracks between the cracks of the giantess’s palms and fingers. Past the waist, the belly, and the breasts, Timmy was lifted to the giantess’s beautiful face. Her blue eyes stared down on him like a goddess, judging his every action leading up to now. Timmy felt the fear overwhelm him and he began to cry.

“Please, don’t hurt me! I don’t wanna die!” Timmy begged, which made the giantess pout pitifully.

“Don’t cry, little one, I’m not going to hurt you,” Diana assured as she gently brought her other hand to comfort the boy. Timmy whimpered and curled in her palm, but then he felt the giantess’s fingers gently stroke him on the back the same way his mother used to for comfort.

“It is alright, tiny one. There is no need to cry, I would never harm a child,” Diana cooed, gently stroking the tiny child’s back. She could feel him shivering like he was cold, except he shivered from fear. “My name is Diana, the princess of the Amazons. What is your name?”

The tiny boy sniffed and choked, wiping his wet nose with his arm. “M-M-My name is T-T-Timmy, M-Miss Giant. Timmy W-Walker.”

“It is a pleasure to meet you, Timmy. And please, call me Diana,” the giantess said softly and gently the same way her mother used to talk to her when she was his age. “Timmy, I know this may be painful for you to talk about, but we’re you one of the people who survived the demise of that metal bird?”

“I don’t know any metal bird,” Timmy said. “All I know is that I was on a plane to Italy with my mommy and my brothers and then... then we flew through a storm and... and...” The traumatic memory of the accident came crashing back into him, and he began to cry harder. “I got hit by lightning and I got shrunk! And then the lightning hit my window, and I got sucked into the sea, and I got swept away as the plane landed into the ocean! I tried to swim, but I was pulled down underwater and I somehow ended up here alone!”

“Oh, Timmy, I am so sorry for your loss and for your predicament,” Diana consoled the boy, “but do not worry because on Themyscira, you are never alone.”

“But I am alone!” Timmy wailed. “I lost my mommy! I lost my brothers! I don’t have a family anymore! I’ll never get to see them again!”

Diana gently shushed the boy as she clenched her fist gently and held him close to her chest. With her thumb, she gently ruffled his hair, massaging his scalp as he released his inner turmoil into her bosom. Such a cruel fate for a child, Diana figures, to be small enough to be stepped on or eaten like a little morsel. He needed guidance, and he needed a mother. To that end...

154222123.content:
...an Amazonian soldier.

Timmy recognizes the designs of the armor. He recognized their spears, their swords, and their glorious shields. Timmy’s mommy told him bedtime stories about the legends of the Greek Amazons, their home island on Themyscira, and their queen, Hippolyta. He was elated to hear that the island was the home of their princess, Diana, the world-renowned superheroine, Wonder Woman.

Timmy always wanted to visit Themyscira and meet the Amazons himself, but the island/country of Themyscira had a strict rule about men setting foot on the island. This rule also stemmed down to little boys, too. Personally, he had every right to be frightened about this than he was now. First of all, the Amazons were strict and absolute. They followed their duty down to a T. Anyone with an XY chromosome (except for a few exceptions) would either be captured, kept prisoner, or be brought back to the World of Man.

The other reason is that Timmy was so small, the giantesses didn’t even see him on the ground. The lead soldier, a black woman unknowingly marched towards Timmy’s position, trailed by a few others. Her sandaled foot raised in the air to take another step, right on top of Timmy. The boy screamed as he rolled away before the sandaled foot fell on that spot, watching the deep foot-shaped impression pressed into the sand.

Then Timmy looked back and did the same thing with the oncoming giant feet, rolling away and yelping while avoiding from being flattened under the soles of the giant Amazonian warriors.

“This is a waste of our time,” addressed the redheaded giantess, Artemis of the Bana-Mighdall. “Whoever the man Menalippe spoke of to our queen would not dare wish to remain on the island without invoking the Amazon’s wrath.”

The leading armored black woman and turned to the impatient Amazon. “Be still your tongue and your impatience, Artemis,” General Phillipus ordered firmly. “Menalippe has never led us astray with her clairvoyance. She spoke of a son of Man’s World would wash upon the shores of Themiscyra, so our orders are to find this son and report him to the queen without prejudice.”

Artemis scoffed. “Fine. So if this son of Man’s World is here, then where has he ended up?”

“Perhaps he has wandered off into the forest?” Phillipus guessed. “Any son from Man’s World would be curious... or foolish enough to enter the forest without knowing what creatures lurk within the trees.”

“If he did, then we would see fresh tracks leading into the woods.”

While the Amazons debated the skepticism of the predictions of their fellow Amazonian oracle, unbeknownst to them at their feet, Timmy watched and listened to it all. He didn’t understand what an oracle was, or why they were looking for him. Maybe it was because he washed up on shore. As he was an eight year-old boy, Timmy first figured that him being there meant he would be subjected to the Amazons’ harsh treatment.

At his size, the Amazons wouldn’t even try to treat him badly! Maybe they’d squish him underneath their feet, swallow him hole, or do whatever torturous methods ran through his thoughts. At that point, Timmy knew what he had to do.

All around Timmy was a tangled mess of soft, dark fibers. There were constant rhythmic rising and falling motion that made him slightly sick. There was even a scent... a scent that smells like dust, sweat, and natural shampoo. After he scrambled to untangle himself, Timmy crawled to the surface and saw everything was so high up from his vantage point, even the monolithic Amazon soldiers that was marching from his point behind him.

When Timmy started to fear the worse, he quickly brushed the black fibers away until he hit the surface.

It was dark chocolate skin. He was on General Philippus's hair!

Somehow, when Artemis kicked her sandal forward, Timmy must have been flung up high in the air and landed on the ebony giant's short hair. Theoretically, because his size and his weight shrunk down, he must have been lighter than air in order to land in a place this high off the ground. If this was the case, then Timmy probably had as much hang time in the air as a falling leaf as it descended to the ground. Timmy looked over the edge of Philippus's giant head, hidden among head of her hair as he looked down to the ground miles below, shuddering from the heights.

Possible images popped in his head as Timmy envisioned one little slip up which would send him tumbling down to the ground where he would be dazed from the fall, but still alive, and in the pathway of the Amazon soldiers. he could practically picture them continuing their march, keeping their eyes on the horizon and on their path, not looking down to see the tiny boy at their feet. Timmy imagined the horror of being caught underfoot of the giant women, getting crushed liked a bug under their sandals, a red smear on their soles which would eventually wash away in the water, never to be seen or heard from again. He felt a bit sick at the thought, seeing as how he'd have to constantly cheat death at his size.

During the march...

15422212333.content:
By some stroke of luck, Timmy managed to land back onto the sand unharmed; however, his luck immediately turned its head when he saw he hadn’t landed far.

The small legion of Amazon giantesses passed him by. Timmy yelped when he saw and immediately jumped out of the way of a blonde Amazons’ sandaled foot. The foot landed just as the tiny eight year-old landed headfirst in a small pile of sand. He managed to shake his way out of the sand, but for a split second, he completely forgot to take into account the giantess whose sandal he hitched onto was literally a step behind him.

Just as Timmy heard one of her footsteps from behind him, he and the pile of sand was suddenly scooped up by a flat, leathery surface. Timmy felt like he was on a slide for just a split surface just before he felt a soft but immense amount of pressure on his back, wedging him between two giant feminine digits. With it, Timmy was held tight between two of Artemis’s goes and forcibly, unknowingly, and unwillingly carried along for the rough ride.

The scent of that fruity and coconut-y was stronger here. The power of Artemis’s toes clenched the boy between the big toe and the index toe. Timmy screamed as he was subjected to an intensely scary front row seat to the rise and fall of Artemis’s foot without anything else to safely strap himself in. The toes loosened slightly with every rise and then they clenched tightly with every fall. The impact knocked Timmy around a little, enough to disorient him and give him a dizzying headache.

Of course, Timmy wasn’t the only one who felt he was knocking around with each footfall. Not long after her debate with Phillipus, Artemis was only several steps into the March when she felt something irritating her left foot. With each step, she felt something in between two of her clenching toes and opted to do something about it. She decided to wriggle her toes, manipulate her digits to push away the tiny obstruction between her foot and her sandal.

Unbeknownst to her, she made a one-inch young boy suffer through it all. The tiny eight year old screamed as suddenly, midway throughout the walk from hell, the giantess wriggled her toes on top of him. The two toes that trapped him smothered Timmy’s tiny body underneath the powerful digits. The five titanic toes squished him against the sandal’s flat. With each little wriggle, Timmy ended up getting squishing him further and further down and deeper underneath the soft and scented sole. Out of desperation, the crying tiny boy beat against the skin of the foot and bit right into it.

Artemis suddenly grunted at the sharp pain underneath her foot. Perhaps she accidentally picked up a biting ant in her sandal? She wriggled the ball of her foot and pressed it harder against the obstruction in her sandal. It was really wriggling underneath her foot. It felt rather nice, if Artemis was being honest with herself, but it was getting in the way of her march. She stopped her march to loosen up her foot from her sandal and tapped the toe section to force the little bug out.

Sending her discomfort, Philippus halted her company and turned to the high-ranking red-haired Amazon foolishly staying behind just to adjust her foot.

“There had better be a reason for you to be falling out of rank, Artemis,” the general addressed her, to which Artemis replied...

154222123331.content:
“There is something in my shoe. I need to check it out.”

The fierce and suspicious Artemis lifted her foot up and held it sideways. By squeezing the leather sandal, Artemis was able to create an opening between the flat and the underside of her foot so the little bug that bit her would roll out and into her open palm.

Timmy, on the other hand, recently experienced neck-breaking vertigo when Artemis tapped her toe section, trying to force him out from under her foot. Thanks to the soft yet firm hold of Artemis’s foot skin, the tiny eight year-old was kept from being thrown out into the sand and possibly stomped on by the giantess. In the midst of being battered, bruised, and disoriented by the ignorant giantess’s feet, Timmy felt the urge to puke from the intense dizziness. Even that didn’t stop him from feeling everything rise up and turn on its side. All of a sudden, the squeezing pressure between her foot and the sandal suddenly gaped open as Timmy felt himself sliding backwards then rolling from underneath the ball, the overbearing toes, and then into the soft, calloused hand of the giantess who unknowingly tormented him.

Timmy coughed and sputtered as the palm he crouched on was lifted to the level of the stern green eyes of the fierce Amazonian warrior. As soon as the tiny boy looked into those giant, seemingly hostile eyes, the boy screamed and curled in a fetal position, turning away from Artemis’s gaze.

“Please don’t hurt me!” Timmy cried as the other gigantic Amazonian soldiers marched up to him and Artemis.

“Artemis, what is that in your hand?” Philippus demanded to know.

“Apparently, I found the fabled son of Man’s World, but he is nothing more now than a bug that found its way into my shoe,” Artemis answered, holding the scared one-inch boy out to Philippus and the other Amazons to see.

“This is an unusual development,” the blonde Amazon, Persephone said. “All children shouldn’t be so small, they’d have to fit inside an Amazon’s shoe.”

“If he truly is the son of Man’s World, then we must report him to the queen at once,” Philippus reminded her troops about the mission. She then extended her palm to the red-haired Amazon. “Artemis, please give him to me so we can ensure him safe escort. Being trapped under your foot seems to have scared him to death.”

Artemis didn’t hesitate to answer. “As you wish,” she said, dumping the suddenly surprised boy into Philippus’s awaiting hand, “but only because I don’t want him biting any part of my body again.”

Timmy tumbled around the darker giantess’s palm, barely having any time to get up as she gently curled her fingers and trapped him in her fist. “Forgive me, child, but the queen has ordered us to take you to her personally,” Philippus said, reaching for a small drawstring sack on her belt, “and this is the only way for me to safely escort you.”

Philippus moves the boy between her fingers, pinched his shirt between three of her fingers and her thumb, and dangled him over the opening of the sack. Timmy screamed and wriggled in the grip as the giant chocolate digits held him over the yawning abyss of the sack’s opening; he was terrified of the dark. The screams got louder as Philippus powered him down into the opening.

“NOOOO!!! Please don’t put in there! I’ll be good, I promise, just don’t put me in there!”

But Philippus didn’t listen. She gently inserted the tiny screaming boy into the sack, and by loosening her fingers, she felt the boy fall to the bottom. She then drew the drawstring close and tight, leaving the opening slightly ajar to let in air for her bite-sized prisoner. With a simple command, Philippus and her troops marched for the queen’s palace in the city.

Within the sack on Philippus’s thigh, Timmy was once again subjected to motions of a giantess’s march. It wasn’t as bad as getting trapped underneath Artemis’s scented feet in her sandal, but he was still getting motion sickness from this experience. What’s worse is that now that he was discovered, he’d be taken to the queen. She would probably keep him for a slave or a toy for torment! She’d lock him in a cage somewhere dark and damp with very little light to reach him. At the very least, she’d send him back to Man’s World with nothing and no one to look after him. Whatever the queen decided, it would change his very life.

Whatever the case was...

1542221233311.content:
Timmy decided to stay in the sack and await his fate. The opening of the drawstring sack was too high and too steep to reach, and the movements of his gigantic captor was making staying in one place difficult. Even if he did attempt an escape, Timmy would most likely be spotted by the giant Amazons and quickly be recaptured. As best as he could, he curled up in the bottom of the savor and felt the motions of Philippus’s thigh rock him gently.

When at last, after his giant captor finally stopped did Timmy feel a primal fear lodge in his throat. The small legion of giantesses finally made it into the palace. Timmy could only curl up and listen as the dark-skinned addressed the high royalty outside the sack.

“My queen, we have found and brought the son of Man’s World to you, as you ordered,” Philippus reported to Queen Hippolyta, ruler of the Amazons.

“You have brought me news of your capture, general, yet I do not see him with you,” Queen Hippolyta observed. “Tell me, where have you taken the son of Man’s World when I have specifically ordered you to bring him to me directly?”

“My Queen, there has been an... unexpected development.” Timmy flinched as daylight broke into the bag the same instance the drawstring was loosened. He barely had time to adjust to the brightness, but from the light, a giant ebony hand with five imposing fingers curled up around him, enveloping him all around in soft flesh. Then he felt the hand lift him out of the confines of the sack, turn him over onto her palm, and felt the fingers loosen and spread out, revealing him to the outside world... to the regal, brunette giantess staring down at him from the throne with a bewildered look.

“This is indeed unexpected,” Hippolyta concurred. “I would never expect a child from Man’s World to be small.”

“He was like this when we found him, highness,” Philippus reported. “He was like this battered and terrified after he endured much torment when he slipped inside of Artemis’s shoe.”

Philippus turned her gaze to Artemis, who stood at attention and bowed her head. “I beg your forgiveness, your highness. I nearly mistook him for a bug under my foot.”

“There is no need to apologize for what you have done, Artemis. I, too, would not have known this child from a bug if it had slipped into my shoe,” Hippolyta said as she descended from her throne, turning to the tiny eight year-old shuddering in the palm of her general.

“And now for the matter at hand, so to speak,” Hippolyta addressed, approaching the fearful boy. You are a lost child, are you not? You are lost and terrified because the cruel hand of fate has shrunken you, hasn’t it? There is no reason for you to fear because I promise no harm may come to youwhile under my charge. Do you understand, child?”

Timmy nodded, whimpering.

“Good. Now then, can you please tell me your name?” Hippolyta asked as though she was addressing her daughter when she was the boy’s age.

“T-Timmy, your majesty. T-Timmy Walker,” the bite-sized boy answered.

“It is a pleasure to make your acquaintance, Timmy Walker. I am Hippolyta, queen of the Amazons and ruler of Themyscira,” the queen introduced herself. Hippolyta held her hand out, and Philippus gently ramped her hand to nudge Timmy to walk onto the awaiting palm. “Can you tell me where you are from and how you came to be this way?”

Timmy sniffled and stifled the urge to cry. “I-I’m from Florida, your majesty. I-I was flying with my family over the ocean to Italy when... when... when a scary storm hit the plane! I don’t know what happened, but I shrunk to this size and I was sucked out of the plane! I fell into the water and I tried to swim but I was so tired, I couldn’t swim anymore! Then I woke up on the beach all alone and... and...”

Timmy couldn’t hold back the urge to cry as he buried his face in his hands. “They’re gone! They’re gone and I can never see them again! I’ll never see my big brothers again! I’ll never see my daddy again! I’ll never see my mommy again!”

While Timmy wept in the queen’s hand, keeling over letting tears flow from his eyes, Hippolyta couldn’t help but feel pity for the poor boy. With her other hand, she gently stroked Timmy’s back like a lost bird trapped in the rain and in need of shelter. “I am sorry, little one. This is a fate you did not deserve to suffer from. I can never imagine the pain of your loss and the terror of being so small compared to the rest of the world.”

Timmy sniffled and choked. “I miss them so much!”

“Your majesty,” Philippus spoke up. “I do not wish to sound insensitive, but what are we supposed to do with the boy? You know as well as anyone else that our sacred law dictates that no man may set foot onto the shores of Themyscira, and despite being a child, he is nonetheless the son of man.”

Hippolyta had taken this to consideration when Menalippe, the oracle, foresaw Timmy’s arrival. However, since she discovered that Timmy is shrunken and devastated in the palm of her hand, things have changed in the snap of the finger. After careful consideration, Hippolyta gave a deep sigh.

“I have made my decision...” she stated...
